 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 You love making things work. You're not in love with a specific solution or technology, but rather delivering value to users.
   

  

 At Tandem, Forward Deployed Engineers are the ones who bridge the gap between
 *the product demo* 
 and
 *real clinicians delivering better more efficient care* 
 . You’ll take on whatever stands in the way of our product’s real-world impact, debugging integrations, tweaking deployments, writing code to fill the gaps, and making sure everything runs smoothly in our customers’ environments. The learnings and abstractions you build along the way will set the foundation for the next generation of the product offering.
   

  

 Making things work for real is often messy & painful - but that’s what makes it fun! The prestige comes from happy customers not using the latest shiny dev tool.
   

  

 You’ll see firsthand how the tech you build actually changes how healthcare works, and you’ll become one of the people that truly understand both the technical and operational sides of what we do.
   

  

 This role is perfect for someone who’s obsessed with solving problems, who codes because they love it, and who cares more about
 *impact* 
 than tech stack. It’s a role for builders - people with founder energy, who want to learn fast, ship fast, and see their work make a difference immediately.
   

  

 If that sounds like you, we’d love to meet you.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Work with deploying, integrating, and optimizing our product in customer environments.
* Debug and solve complex, real-world problems across infrastructure, APIs, data flows, RPA, and configuration.
* Write clean, pragmatic code to adapt and extend our systems for each unique use case.
* Collaborate directly with clinicians, partners, and our internal teams to remove blockers and make deployments seamless.
* Shape the next generation of our product such that the next rollout delivers more value, more smoothly.
* Continuously identify, automate, and improve the painful parts of deployment so we can scale smarter next time.


**What You Bring**
* Deep love for programming and problem-solving.
* Curiosity that borders on obsession - you like understanding why things work (or don’t).
* A bias toward action - you’d rather get things done than talk about them.
* Comfort working in ambiguity and high velocity.
* A mindset that leans toward ownership, creativity, and future-founder energy.


 Bonus Points
   

  

* Experience integrating or deploying complex products in healthcare.
* Any other language skills than a fluency in English is a plus, especially German.
* Solid experience coding in Python, TypeScript, or C#.
* Experience with Robotic Process Automation (RPA) in the web or Windows context.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of Stockholm where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of 4 stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* Technical interviews with some of our Engineers
* Interview with our CTO & Co-Founder
* Home case and presentation at our office - Join us in the Stockholm office for a lunch, a presentation and som pair programming to experience our our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Benefits**
* Competitive salary & company stock options
* 25 days/year of paid vacation
* Pension
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (friskvårdsbidrag)
* Social and team-building activities (off-sites, after works, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact in the world of healthcare
* Work with some of the best minds in AI, healthcare, and engineering.


*We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*
**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Fedex Courier Stockholm Area
description:
We have an exciting opportunity for you to join our team of Couriers.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 FedEx is the largest express transportation company in the world, connecting more than 220 countries and territories. We work every moment to deliver the most important package of someone’s day. Our team of passionate people know their day-to-day work is invaluable in delivering outstanding experience to our customers. 530,000 team members strong, we are as diverse as the world we serve. We love what we do, and we do it well. Our reach is big, and so are our dreams. Join us and let's write our next chapter together.
   

  

**What You Will Be Doing**
* Representing FedEx in front of our customers, courteously picking up and delivering their packages
* Driving vehicles in FedEx fleet on defined routes in various postcodes, making sure customers’ packages get to the right place, on time
* Making sure vehicles are always operated safely and legally
* Following all FedEx Health and Safety and other company policies and procedures


**What Do You Bring With You**
* Be a reliable team player
* Be energetic and enthusiastic
* Have a strong customer focus
* Have good communication skills
* Have an eye for detail to make sure paperwork is correct
* Holding a valid driving license for type of vehicle assigned is essential and held for 2+ years would be an advantage.
* Adaptability to external driving conditions and circumstances is required
* Commercial driving experience would be an advantage
* Basic geographical knowledge


**What Do We Offer**
* Attractive compensation package
* Training to get you started and on-the-job learning opportunities
* Extensive learning resources to further develop your skills and knowledge
* Tuition Assistance Program (\*applicable for FedEx positions with a permanent contract)
* Employee Assistance Program for you and your family in difficult life situations
* Employee reduced-rate shipping
* Great career opportunities
* FedEx is one of the worlds most admired companies and trusted brands year after year


 Bring your ideas, individuality, and dreams to our global community. Feel good about where you work. Choose your career path - we’re ready to invest in your development. Join FedEx.
   

  

 FedEx was built on a philosophy that puts people first, one we take seriously. We are an equal opportunity employer and we are committed to a diverse and inclusive workforce in which we provide growth opportunities for all
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

 FedEx is one of the world's largest express transportation companies and has consistently been selected as one of the top 10 World’s Most Admired Companies by "Fortune" magazine. Every day FedEx delivers for its customers with transportation and business solutions, serving more than 220 countries and territories around the globe. We can serve this global network due to our outstanding team of FedEx team members, who are tasked with making every FedEx experience outstanding.
   

  

 Our Philosophy
   

  

 The People-Service-Profit philosophy (P-S-P) describes the principles that govern every FedEx decision, policy or activity. FedEx takes care of our people; they, in turn, deliver the impeccable service demanded by our customers, who reward us with the profitability necessary to secure our future. The essential element in making the People-Service-Profit philosophy such a positive force for the company is where we close the circle, and return these profits back into the business, and invest back in our people. Our success in the industry is attributed to our people. Through our P-S-P philosophy, we have a work environment that encourages team members to be innovative in delivering the highest possible quality of service to our customers. We care for their well-being, and value their contributions to the company.
   

  

 Our Culture
   

  

 Our culture is important for many reasons, and we intentionally bring it to life through our behaviors, actions and activities in every part of the world. The FedEx culture and values have been a cornerstone of our success and growth since we began in the early 1970’s. While other companies can copy our systems, infrastructure and processes, our culture makes us unique and is often a differentiating factor as we compete and grow in today’s global marketplace.

title: Vice President - Corporate Finance (Technology M&A)
description:
**Business Unit:**
 Corporate Finance
   

  

**Industry:**
 Technology
   

  

**Overview**
 Houlihan Lokey, Inc. (NYSE:HLI) is a leading global investment bank recognized for delivering independent strategic and financial advice to corporations, financial sponsors, and governments. With uniquely deep industry expertise, broad international reach, and a partnership approach rooted in trust, the firm provides innovative, integrated solutions across mergers and acquisitions, capital solutions, financial restructuring, and financial and valuation advisory. Our unmatched transaction volumes provide differentiated, data-driven perspectives that help our clients achieve their most critical goals. To learn more about Houlihan Lokey, please visit HL.com.
   

  

**Corporate Finance**
 The Houlihan Lokey Corporate Finance business has extensive expertise in mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, activist shareholder and takeover defense, and other related advisory services for a broad range of clients. In addition, we have the proven ability to engineer and execute financing solutions that are essential for growth and success and offer access to financing in the public and alternative capital markets through the issuance of debt, equity, or hybrid securities. In EMEA, we work with a wide spectrum of companies, from middle-market privately owned enterprises to large multinational organizations. With a growing platform of Corporate Finance professionals and offices across the region, in addition to our global reach and in-depth knowledge across a broad range of industries, we have the breadth and targeted expertise to provide exceptional client service.
   

  

**Technology**
 The Houlihan Lokey Technology Team is recognized as a global leader in providing high quality, relationship-based advice to clients across the broader technology space. We have an extensive track record of working with both domestic and international clients and delivering creative, effective, and successful outcomes based on our deep understanding of our clients, their business models, and the markets in which they operate. In 2024, our team was ranked the No.1 M&A advisor for all global Technology transactions. With a team of more than 200 bankers globally, and c. 70 across Europe, it is a very exciting time to join the team.
   

  

**Scope**
 The Technology team at Houlihan Lokey is looking to add a Vice President in Stockholm.
   

  

 The environment at Houlihan Lokey is both collegial and entrepreneurial. Teamwork is essential to the firm’s success. At the same time, creativity and new ideas are encouraged. Vice Presidents are given substantial responsibility and are encouraged to help us grow our business.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 You will:
   

  

* Lead the execution of Technology transactions
* Develop and review financial models including database systems
* Coordinate and perform business due diligence, lead and execute M&A transactions
* Prepare confidential information memoranda, management presentations, marketing pitches and other presentations
* Manage and develop the junior team
* Build relationships and maintain direct contact with clients, prospective clients and professional advisors
* Acting as a key client contact on transactions, leading client meetings and playing a significant role in pitches
* Assist in initiating and extending group marketing and client development efforts


**Requirements / Qualifications**
* 6-8 years’ experience in Investment Banking / Corporate Finance
* Experience in the Technology sector favourably regarded, including completion of sell side mandates
* Strong execution experience on end-to-end deals (closed deal experience)
* Demonstrated experience managing and mentoring Analysts and Associates
* Must have the ability to handle multiple assignments simultaneously
* Strong knowledge of accounting and applied financial theory
* Strong work ethic, organizational skills and ability to multitask
* Strategic mindset and strong sector insight with the ability to suggest the best solutions for our clients
* Motivated, creative, outgoing and possess strong skills in financial analysis
* Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment
* Ability to grow our business and act entrepreneurially


***We are an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, gender identity, sexual orientation, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.***

title: B2B Digital Wholesale Intern
description:
**Position** 
 : B2B Digital Wholesale Intern
   

  

**Working hours** 
 : Full Time
   

  

**Location** 
 : Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

**Reports to** 
 : Business development manager
   

  

**Responsibility:** 
 NuORDER B2B platform
   

  

**Compensation:** 
 This is an
 **unpaid internship** 
 .
   

  

**Requirements:** 
 You must be
 **currently enrolled in a relevant educational program** 
 .
   

  

**Start date:** 
 As soon as possible, with a preferred commitment of
 **4–6 months** 
 .
   

  

 As a B2B Digital Wholesale Intern, you will support the team in managing and optimizing the B2B digital wholesale experience.
   

  

 This internship offers hands-on experience in managing content for the B2B platform, including digital storefront updates, sell-in tools, wholesale campaign materials, and training documents — contributing directly to the platform’s functionality, visual storytelling, and commercial impact.
   

  

 Working tasks
   

  

* Digital Storefront Management Assist in maintaining the B2B digital storefront (NuOrder), ensuring the Brand Page is consistently updated with new collections, marketing content, campaign assets, and sales tools.
* Sell-in Material Development Support the creation of seasonal sell-in materials such as sales books and linesheets, in alignment with global sales calendars and product assortments.
* Wholesale Campaign Content Help build and upload seasonal wholesale campaign materials into the digital platform.
* Training Material Support Contribute to the development and updating of internal B2B training documents and onboarding materials for sales teams.
* Product Data Quality Checks Assist in performing seasonal cross-checks of linesheets and digital assortments to ensure completeness of product imagery and information.
* Business analysis Assist in gathering, analyzing, and interpreting data to improve business performance.
* Learning & Development Take part in internal meetings, B2B trainings, and cross-departmental sessions to develop a broader understanding of the fashion industry.


 Internal Stakeholders
   

  

* Omni-Channel Team
* Global Sales Representatives
* NuOrder CSM
* Marketing Team
* IT team


 Desired Characteristics and Qualification
   

  

* Currently studying in a relevant field such as Business, Marketing, Content, Fashion Management, or a similar area.
* Interested in gaining hands-on experience in B2B digital Wholesale, and platform content management.
* Curious, proactive, and eager to learn about how digital tools and content support sales and brand visibility in a wholesale environment.
* Comfortable working with digital systems and tools — basic knowledge of Excel, PowerPoint, or similar software is helpful.
* Detail-oriented and organized, with a good visual sense and an understanding of how clear presentation impacts customer experience.
* Open to supporting various tasks, from updating digital content to checking product data and assisting in internal documentation.
* Positive mindset with a "can-do" attitude and a willingness to grow in a fast-paced, fashion-forward environment.
* Passion for fashion, digital innovation, and learning how global wholesale B2B function behind the scenes.


 Work experience and education
   

  

* Currently studying in relevant field.
* Previous exposure to wholesale or the fashion industry is considered as an advantage.


 As part of a J.Lindeberg Team we are all from time to time involved in cross functional and collaborative projects of different characters.
   

  

 J.Lindeberg Values
   

  

 As part of J.Lindeberg you are an ambassador for J.Lindeberg and inspire our partners by living our Values.
   

  

* Progressive - We strive to be at the forefront and we dare to challenge the status guo. It comes from our Scandinavian heritage – we are innovators within apparel, use of resources and way of working.
* Energetic -We are bringing energy into everything we do, we are entrepreneurial and agile. We are ready to do more and better each time. It makes our brand vibrant and magnetic.
* Inclusive - We are a people company. We are diverse and responsible. We act with integrity and take full accountability for what we do. We are a global community. We care for the planet and each other.


 Founded in Stockholm 1996, J.Lindeberg inspires unconventional thinkers to live life to the fullest. The international fashion house bridges fashion and sport, offering sophisticated, edgy and comfortable products for a modern active lifestyle. The collections bring together creativity and Scandinavian progressiveness – for innovative fashion and outdoor lifestyle wear that is sustainable and delivered through a customer-focused, seamless experience.
   

  

 With headquarters in Stockholm, Sweden, the distribution covers more than 35 countries. There are 157 J.Lindeberg stores in several of the major fashion capitals of the world, such as Copenhagen, New York, Tokyo, Hong Kong and Shanghai. The wholesale distribution features close to 2000 stores, including the leading high-end department and specialty stores around the world.

title: Data Scientist, Subscriptions
description:
The Subscriptions Mission drives the growth and evolution of the Spotify business, ensuring we deliver compelling value to hundreds of millions of subscribers worldwide. We are focused on building the right set of offerings, plans, and value propositions that attract new subscribers and deepen engagement with existing ones.
   

  

 You'll join the Portfolio Data Science team, part of Subscriptions Product Insights. The Portfolio Focus Area is responsible for evolving and adapting Spotify's existing subscription plans to drive subscriber growth and engagement, as well as creating new revenue streams through add-ons and new value propositions. This work requires coordination across the entire Subscriptions Mission and multiple focus areas, with ownership and oversight from the Portfolio leadership team.
   

  

 As a Data Scientist on this team, you'll help the Portfolio team make informed decisions about how to grow and diversify Spotify's paid offerings. You'll analyze subscriber behavior, measure the impact of plan changes and new propositions, and surface insights that shape our strategy. Your work will directly influence how the Spotify experience evolves for users around the world.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Analyze subscriber behavior and engagement patterns to identify opportunities for plan evolution and new value propositions
* Design and analyze experiments to measure the impact of changes to subscription plans and add-on offerings
* Define and maintain success metrics for Portfolio initiatives, ensuring alignment across cross-functional partners
* Build and maintain dashboards and reporting to monitor the health and performance of subscription plans and new revenue streams
* Perform exploratory analyses that uncover growth levers and inform the Portfolio roadmap
* Collaborate with Product, Engineering, Design, User Research and other Data Science teams across the Subscriptions Mission
* Communicate findings and recommendations clearly to both technical and non-technical audiences, including senior leadership
* Use AI-powered tools (e.g., Claude Code, Codex) to accelerate analysis and workflows


 Who You Are
   

  

* You have 3+ years of experience in data science or analytics, ideally at a consumer tech or subscription-based company
* You hold a degree in Statistics, Economics, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience)
* You are proficient in SQL and Python and comfortable working with large-scale datasets
* You have experience designing and analyzing A/B tests, with a solid understanding of statistical methods
* You are a clear communicator who can translate complex analyses into actionable recommendations
* You are curious, proactive, and comfortable navigating ambiguity in a fast-moving business
* You enjoy collaborating across teams and are comfortable working in environments that require coordination across multiple stakeholders and workstreams


 Where You'll Be
   

  

* This role is based in London, Stockholm or New York.
* We offer you the flexibility to work where you work best! There will be some in person meetings, but still allows for flexibility to work from home.


 The United States base range for this position is $76,840 - $109,771, plus equity. The benefits available for this position include health insurance, six month paid parental leave, 401(k) retirement plan, monthly meal allowance, 23 paid days off, paid flexible holidays, paid sick leave. These ranges may be modified in the future.
   

  

 Spotify is an equal opportunity employer. You are welcome at Spotify for who you are, no matter where you come from, what you look like, or what’s playing in your headphones. Our platform is for everyone, and so is our workplace. The more voices we have represented and amplified in our business, the more we will all thrive, contribute, and be forward-thinking! So bring us your personal experience, your perspectives, and your background. It’s in our differences that we will find the power to keep revolutionizing the way the world listens.
   

  

 At Spotify, we are passionate about inclusivity and making sure our entire recruitment process is accessible to everyone. We have ways to request reasonable accommodations during the interview process and help assist in what you need. If you need accommodations at any stage of the application or interview process, please let us know - we’re here to support you in any way we can.
   

  

 Spotify transformed music listening forever when we launched in 2008. Our mission is to unlock the potential of human creativity by giving a million creative artists the opportunity to live off their art and billions of fans the chance to enjoy and be passionate about these creators. Everything we do is driven by our love for music and podcasting. Today, we are the world’s most popular audio streaming subscription service.

title: Product Guide (Sales Associate) - Stockholm (m/f/d)
description:
**Your Opportunity at Arc'teryx** 

   
 




  






 As we grow across Europe, we’re looking for people who lead with curiosity, learn by doing and want a long-term path in retail. At Arc’teryx we believe there’s always a better way and that guides how we develop our teams, and our “Leave It Better” spirit shapes the way we work. 
 





  
 





 Our Product Guides grow through hands-on learning, steady coaching and opportunities across stores, regions and teams. 
 




  






 We’re looking for a passionate 
 
**Product Guide (all genders)** 

  to join our team at our Store in 
 
**Stockholm.** 

  You’re the face of our brand - bringing energy, expertise, and unforgettable experiences to every guest. You live for the outdoors, love our products, and share that passion authentically. You grow with us, lift others up, and help shape a community that thrives on connection, nature, and bold ideas. 
 





  




**As an Arc’teryx Product Guide, here’s what you’d be doing:** 
* **Create Meaningful Guest Experiences** 
 : You bring energy and expertise to every interaction - sharing product knowledge, solving problems, and helping guests find gear that fits their needs and passions.
* **Live the Brand, Inside and Out:** 
 As a true Arc'teryx ambassador, you represent our values both in-store and in the community. You stay curious, keep learning, and inspire others to connect with nature.
* **Grow and Collaborate:** 
 You develop your skills with the support of your team, contribute to brand initiatives, and help elevate the store experience through feedback and collaboration.
* **Keep the Store Running Smoothly:** 
 From processing transactions and handling guest expectations to unpacking inventory and supporting daily tasks—you help make sure everything flows.


**Life in Our Stores** 
  You’ll be part of a team that enjoys spending time outdoors together, shares product knowledge, builds strong guest relationships, and takes pride in the details. The work is hands-on, thoughtful and rooted in connection to the outdoors and community. 
 
  




**Are you our next Product Guide?** 
* **Guest-Centric Mindset** 
 : A passion for delivering exceptional guest experiences and fostering brand loyalty through service, storytelling, and community engagement.
* **Own Your Impact:** 
 You take responsibility, stay self-motivated, and love solving problems. You seek smart solutions, even when they’re not the easiest.
* **Disruptive Evolution:** 
 You challenge the status quo, inspire new ideas, and embrace continuous improvement - for yourself and those around you.
* **Language Skills** 
 : Fluency in both the local language (e.g., German) and English is essential.
* **Flexibility** 
 : Willingness to work key retail periods (e.g., Black Friday and holiday season) and ability to lift up to 30 lbs as needed.






  




  


**Hours:**





 Full Time – 30-40 hours per week (5 days a week) 
 




  





**Compensation:** 

  Hourly
 




  





**Growth At Arc’teryx:**

 Growth happens through practice, feedback and the support of a wider community at Arc’teryx. As we open more stores across the region, new opportunities continue to emerge for teammates who want to build their skills and take on greater responsibility. 
 




  





**What We Value In Our Teams:**

 Our stores bring together teammates from a range of cultures, languages and backgrounds, and this mix shapes how we learn from one another and how we serve our guests.
 





   
 




**How We Hire:**

 We keep our hiring process straightforward and thoughtful, and we review each application with care and will reach out if your experience aligns with what we’re looking for.  
 




  





**Perks & Benefits:**




  





**LIVE IT:**

 Time and space to connect with nature and pursue a purposeful life 
 




**Scheduling Support:**

 Predictable scheduling/ rota planning that supports team balance 
 




**Arc' Adventure:**

 An employee recognition program offering outdoor experiences 
 




**Growth & Learning:**

 Access to leadership training, skill-building workshops and career development programs 
 




**Wellbeing Resources:**

 Support programs that promote physical, mental and financial wellbeing 
 




**Gear Access:**

 Generous employee purchase program + industry pro deals 
 




**Care & Repair:**

 Access to product care guidance and repair services align with our ReBIRD commitment   
 




  





*\*Benefits may vary by role and location*

title: Risk Manager - Cybersecurity
description:
Are you passionate about ensuring that complex medical software is secure, resilient, and fully compliant with international standards? As Risk Manager, you will take ownership of identifying and mitigating risks within cybersecurity and information security across our products. With a structured mindset and keen attention to detail, you will play a central role in maintaining the integrity, reliability, and compliance of our software solutions.
   

  

**About The Job**
 As Risk Manager, you will be responsible for identifying, assessing, and mitigating cybersecurity and information security risks across all RaySearch products. As part of a smaller cybersecurity group, you will work with all aspects of cybersecurity for our product delivery including compliance, threat modelling, developer training, penetration testing, CI/CD, tooling and more. Your responsibilities will span the entire product lifecycle, with a particular focus on cloud-based solutions and secure software development practices. You will collaborate closely with development teams across the organization and work alongside other Risk Managers to ensure comprehensive risk management and compliance with international standards.
   

  

**Main Responsibilities**
* Participate in project planning together with the project management team.
* Support the development team with risk management related tasks, e.g., ensuring that the risk management process is applied, taking part in design and risk analysis of new and changed functionality and ensuring that risks are appropriately mitigated and tested.
* Own and maintain the project’s risk management documentation.
* Coordinate cybersecurity management activities within product development and the secure software development life cycle (SSDLC).



**Your profile**
 We are looking for someone who understands the importance of risk management in medical software and is motivated by working in this field with all the responsibilities it entails. You are responsible, meticulous and structured, with a strong personal drive and the ability to work independently in a highly organized and efficient manner. You also bring a background in system development – not necessarily as a developer – but with sufficient technical understanding to navigate complex software environments and processes.
   

  

**Requirements**
* BSc or MSc degree in engineering, or equivalent
* 3+ years’ experience in software development with complex products
* Excellent written and spoken communication skills (English and Swedish)


**Meriting**
* Experience from the medtech industry or other regulated or safety critical industries
* Experience of device risk management
* Experience with product safety standard requirements for medical devices (IEC/ISO standards, e.g., ISO 14971)
* Leadership or project management experience
* Experience as a system developer


**Our Culture**
 Culture at RaySeach is the driving force behind our organization
 **,** 
 where everything we do is driven by a shared passion for innovation and the fight against cancer. Our dedication is reflected in our ability to deliver exceptional results, pay close attention to detail, and consistently go the extra mile. Our employees stand out as experts in their field, driven by a relentless focus on solving problems - no matter how complex. At RaySearch, we take pride in leading the way in cancer treatment, leveraging cutting-edge technology to develop innovative solutions that make a real difference in patient care.
   

  

**Our Offer**
 At RaySearch, we offer a diverse and inclusive work environment, fostering openness, sincerity, and collaboration. Located in Hagastaden, Stockholm's Life Science Hub, our modern and creative workspace includes an in-house gym, yoga, and social activities like ping pong, table football, and regular after-work events. Our bistro serves a fantastic lunch buffet, and we offer morning- and afternoon-fika every day. Our rooftop terrace also provides a stunning 360-degree view of Stockholm, enhancing the work experience. All of this comes attached with a competitive compensation and benefits package.
   

  

**Application**
 Please apply to the position through the application form below. Selection and interviews will be ongoing. We do not accept applications by email.

title: Konsult inom försvar
description:
Hos Rejlers är vi med och
 **bygger framtidens försvarslösningar** 
 . I våra uppdrag utvecklar vi
 **teknik som stärker Sveriges säkerhet** 
 och bidrar till en tryggare värld.
   

  

 Vi samarbetar med Försvarsmakten, FMV och försvarsindustrin – alltid med målet att ligga i teknisk framkant och leverera
 **hållbara lösningar med verklig påverkan** 
 .
   

  

 Nu söker vi dig som vill växa tillsammans med ett erfaret team i Mälardalen, där lärande, utveckling, frihet och ansvar står i centrum.
   

  

**About The Job**
 Som
 **konsult inom försvar** 
 arbetar du i gränslandet mellan
 **IT, telekom och systemintegration men även säkerhet** 
 . Du verkar i nära samverkan med våra kunder inom försvarssektorn och tar ansvar för
 **delar eller helheter av produkter** 
 i våra uppdrag – från
 **kravställning och integration** 
 till
 **verifiering och validering i kundens miljö** 
 .
   

  

 Uppdragen kan exempelvis omfatta:
   

  

* Beredskap – berätta hur man förbereder sig som företag och offentlig sektor
* Kravhantering, konfigurationsledning och ILS
* Integration av ledningsstödsystem bestående av informationssystem (IT-system med applikationer för brukare) och radiosystem
* Kommunikationssystem såsom radio, fiber eller satellit
* Fordonsintegrationer, luftvärnssystem, stabsarbete
* Arbete med säkerhetsskydd, informationssäkerhet och säkerhetskänsliga miljöer
* Projektledning eller tekniskt stöd i upphandlingar enligt LOU/LUFS


 Du arbetar till stor del
 **på plats hos kund** 
 , främst i
 **Stockholm med omnejd** 
 , och kombinerar detta med tid på våra kontor i
 **Enköping eller Stockholm** 
 . Det ger dig möjlighet att
 **förstå verksamheten på djupet** 
 och se hur tekniken används i praktiken.
   

  

 Vi arbetar enligt
 **uppdragstaktik** 
 , vilket innebär att du får
 **stor frihet under ansvar** 
 i hur du planerar och genomför ditt arbete – i kombination med
 **starkt stöd från seniora kollegor** 
 i teamet.
   

  

 WHO ARE YOU?
   

  

 För att lyckas i rollen ser vi att du har:
   

  

* Bakgrund som ingenjör eller officer/specialistofficer, alternativt militär erfarenhet i kombination med teknisk utbildning
* Något eller några års erfarenhet inom försvarssektorn eller försvarsnära verksamhet
* B-körkort
* Svenskt medborgarskap (rollen kräver säkerhetsprövning)
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift


 Du har erfarenhet av eller ett tydligt intresse för arbete inom
 **system engineering, kravhantering, konfigurationsledning eller ILS** 
 . Du är även nyfiken på teknikområden som
 **radio-, satellit- eller fiberkommunikation** 
 ,
 **IT- och informationssäkerhet** 
 samt
 **ledningsstödsystem** 
 .
   

  

 Det är meriterande om du har arbetat som
 **systemingenjör, teknisk officer, projektledare eller med säkerhetsskydd** 
 .
   

  

 Som person är du
 **ödmjuk, nyfiken och tålmodig** 
 . Du uppskattar
 **struktur och noggrannhet** 
 , men är också
 **lösningsorienterad och flexibel** 
 . Du samarbetar gärna med andra, tar eget ansvar och trivs i miljöer där
 **teknik möter samhällsnytta** 
 . För dig är det meningsfullt att arbeta med uppdrag som
 **bidrar till något större** 
 . 💡
   

  

**What You Get**
 På Rejlers blir du en del av
 **ett kompetent och erfaret team inom Defence & Security** 
 , där
 **kunskapsdelning, mentorskap och** 
**samarbete är en naturlig del av vardagen.**
 Du arbetar tillsammans med seniora kollegor som gärna delar med sig av sin erfarenhet samtidigt som du får möjlighet att
 **växa, ta större ansvar och utvecklas i din egen takt** 
 .
   

  

 Vi erbjuder
 **flexibla arbetssätt** 
 ,
 **ett generöst förmånspaket** 
 och
 **stor variation i uppdragen** 
 . Hos oss finns ingen liten mall –
 **vi söker konsulter brett** 
 , och du passar sannolikt in i vårat lag. Med dina specifika kunskaper och kompetenser kommer du vara en viktig del i uppdraget.
   

  

 Rejlers är ett bolag i
 **tillväxt med stark framtidstro** 
 . Här får du möjlighet att
 **ta nästa steg och göra verklig skillnad** 
 – för våra kunder, för samhället och för framtiden. 🌍
   

  

*Som ett kvalitativt led i våra rekryteringsprocesser kommer en bakgrundskontroll genomföras på slutkandidaten.*
*Vissa roller kräver även annan kontroll, såsom t.ex. säkerhetsprövning, innan uppdrag hos vissa kunder - om det är aktuellt för tjänsten du sökt så kommer du att få mer information kring det i ett senare skede. Ytterligare information hittar du även här:* 
  

  

 Behandling av personuppgifter | Rejlers
   

  

*Vi granskar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan komma att bli tillsatt innan sista ansökningsdag.*

title: Senior Account Executive - Stockholm
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 We’re looking for a
 **Senior Account Executive** 
 to help drive and grow our footprint across the Swedish region. You’ll be at the forefront of introducing Tandem’s clinician copilot to providers, partners, and health systems - shaping how we scale across Sweden.
   

  

 In this position, you will actively represent Tandem at trade fairs, events, and in direct conversations with physicians, doctors, and decision-makers. You contribute to our mission where it matters most - into personal contact with our future partners. Your goal is to position our solutions in the market, drive new business, and strengthen existing relationships.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Actively acquire new customers through a combination of outbound efforts (cold calling, appointment setting, product demos, negotiations, and closing) and partner-led sales in close collaboration with commercial partners (e.g. Tieto), with both channels being equally important for success.
* Drive and contribute to public tender processes, ensuring high-quality submissions and strategic positioning; prior experience working with public tenders is highly desirable.
* Build and maintain strong, long-term relationships with a diverse group of stakeholders, including end-users (such as social workers, medical nurses, and student health professionals), key decision-makers within municipalities (primarily social services and student health), and commercial partners.
* Develop a deep understanding of end-user needs and pain points, demonstrating a genuine interest in improving their day-to-day work and outcomes.
* Represent Tandem Health at trade fairs, conferences, and industry events, acting as an ambassador for our mission, solutions, and long-term vision.
* Strategically plan and execute sales initiatives to effectively penetrate and grow within the Swedish municipalities market, with a focus on building sustainable, long-term partnerships rather than short-term wins.
* Collaborate closely with SDR, marketing, product, customer success, and partner teams to incorporate market feedback and continuously improve the customer experience and offering.
* Use digital GTM tools and CRM systems to manage leads, opportunities, and partnerships in a structured, transparent way.


**What You Bring**
* Demonstrated multi-year successful sales experience, ideally gained in the SaaS, technology, healthcare or municipalities sector.
* Strong communication and negotiation skills, with the ability to deliver compelling presentations to diverse audiences.
* Prior experience driving and / or contributing to public tender processes would be highly beneficial in this role.
* A high level of initiative, a structured approach to work, and a passion for embracing challenges in a dynamic environment.
* Native level in Swedish and fluent in English, with excellent communication skills, both written and spoken.
* Passion for improving healthcare delivery through thoughtful, impactful innovation.


**Bonus Points**
* Experience working with or selling into EHR providers, health systems, or care delivery platforms.
* Background in medtech, digital health, or regulated software.
* A completed degree in business administration, healthcare management, or a comparable qualification.
* Experience in startup or high-growth environments, especially launching new markets.


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This is a
 **full-time role based in Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily in order to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 Our interview process consists of stages:
   

  

* Screening interview with Talent Acquisition
* First interview with Head of Commercial Excellence
* Second interview with our Country Director
* Working Day - Join us in the Stockholm office for a day to experience our culture firsthand, collaborate with our team, and see how you work in action.


**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: HR-systemspecialist (vikariat)
description:
**För En Hållbar Framtid Tillsammans**
 Coop är Sveriges största kooperation och en ledande aktör inom dagligvaruhandeln, med över 4 miljoner medlemmar. Vi har ett stort fokus på hållbarhet och arbetar för att skapa en mer grön och rättvis framtid genom att erbjuda hållbara produkter och tjänster.
   

  

 Vi tror på att en mångfald av perspektiv och erfarenheter är nyckeln till att skapa en mer inkluderande och framgångsrik arbetsplats. Därför välkomnar vi alla oavsett kön, ålder, bakgrund och etnisk tillhörighet.
   

  

**Bli en del av Coop – Tillsammans gör vi mat-Sverige hållbart!**
**Om Tjänsten**
 Vill du vara med och bidra till framtidens hållbara dagligvaruhandel samtidigt som du bidrar till Coops digitala utveckling?
   

  

 Vi söker nu efter en HR-systemspecialist på ett vikariat till den 31a augusti. I rollen ansvarar du för att säkerställa att våra HR-system stödjer verksamhetens behov på ett effektivt, stabilt och kvalitetssäkrat sätt. Du arbetar både med löpande förvaltning och utveckling av våra system och har ett helhetsperspektiv på hur de samverkar med våra HR-processer och övriga verksamhetsstöd. Rollen innebär många kontaktytor där du samarbetar med HR, verksamheten, IT och externa leverantörer.
   

  

 Du agerar kravställare gentemot leverantörer och IT, säkerställer stabila integrationer och följer upp att funktionalitet och leveranser håller rätt kvalitet. I rollen deltar du i eller leder systemrelaterade initiativ, ansvarar för testning vid uppdateringar och förändringar samt fungerar som superuser med kvalificerad support till chefer och medarbetare. Som HR-systemspecialist är du en nyckelperson i att skapa struktur, kvalitet och kontinuerlig förbättring inom vårt HR-systemlandskap.
   

  

**Som HR-systemspecialistkommer Är Dina Ansvarsområden**
* Ha ett övergripande ansvar för att våra HR-system är ändamålsenliga, uppdaterade och anpassade efter verksamhetens behov
* Arbeta nära processansvariga för att säkerställa att systemen stödjer och utvecklar våra HR-processer
* Övervaka integrationer mellan HR-system och närliggande system
* Ta fram, underhåller och utvecklar rapporter samt följer upp relevanta KPI:er
* Ansvara för behörighetshantering, gallring och hantering av persondata i enlighet med GDPR


***Vem är du?***
 Vi söker dig som har erfarenhet av arbete med HR-system i en större organisation och som trivs i en roll med både ansvar och bredd. Du arbetar strukturerat och noggrant, tar ansvar för dina leveranser och säkerställer att våra system fungerar stabilt och effektivt i det dagliga arbetet. Du har ett lösningsorienterat förhållningssätt och bidrar till att upprätthålla kvalitet och kontinuitet i vår systemförvaltning.
   

  

 Rollen kräver en stark pedagogisk förmåga. Du tycker om att stötta chefer och kollegor i deras arbete i systemen och kan förklara både arbetssätt och tekniska samband på ett tydligt och anpassat sätt. Du bygger goda relationer i organisationen, samarbetar väl med olika funktioner och känner dig trygg i att arbeta självständigt när det behövs. Du har förmåga att prioritera, arbeta mot deadlines och bidra till en stabil och välfungerande systemförvaltning, även i perioder med högre tempo.
   

  

**För att vara framgångsrik i rollen ser vi gärna att du har:**
* Flerårig erfarenhet av liknande arbete inom HR-systemförvaltning
* Dokumenterad erfarenhet av arbete i olika HR-system
* Akademisk examen inom HR eller motsvarande erfarenhet inom HR/system


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet från retail eller dagligvaruhandel
* Arbetat med HR+8 eller Visma Talent


**Vårt Erbjudande Till Dig**
 Hos oss får du möjlighet att arbeta i en verksamhet med tydligt samhällsengagemang och starkt hållbarhetsfokus. Du blir en del av ett engagerat HR-team och får arbeta i en roll med stort ansvar och bred kontaktyta inom organisationen. Vi arbetar från kontoret tre dagar i veckan och erbjuder flexibilitet resterande dagar. Vi erbjuder konkurrenskraftiga förmåner och en god balans mellan arbete och fritid.
   

  

**Så Ansöker Du**
 Låter detta som din nästa utmaning? Skicka in din ansökan så snart som möjligt då vi arbetar löpande med urval och intervjuer.
   

  

 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande ledare Caroline Di Paolo på e-postadress caroline.dipaolo@coop.se.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!

title: Elektronikmontör till Saab Surveillance
description:
**Om företaget**
 Saab är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med uppdrag att hjälpa nationer att skydda sin befolkning och bidrar till trygghet för människor och samhällen. Med flera tusen talangfulla medarbetare utvecklar Saab teknik och lösningar för en säkrare och mer hållbar värld.
   

  

 Affärsområdet Surveillance är en av världens främsta leverantörer av övervakningslösningar, flygelektronik samt system för att upptäcka, lokalisera och skydda mot hot. På Surveillance hittar du en kreativ arbetsmiljö som kännetecknas av engagemang, professionalism och arbetsglädje. Skill söker nu elektronikmontörer för framtida behov på Saab Surveillance i Järfälla.
   

  

**Dina arbetsuppgifter**
 Som elektronikmontör på Saab består arbetsuppgifterna av montering, lödning, avsyning och testning inom elektronikproduktionen. Du kommer aktivt behöva läsa och förstå ritningar samt dokument på svenska och engelska. Vid behov jobbar du även med avvikelsehantering.
   

  

 Rollen som elektronikmontör är varierad och omfattar både nytillverkning och framtagning av tidiga prototyper utifrån provisoriska underlag. Arbetet kan även inkludera reparation och förbättring av befintliga produkter samt modifiering och översyn av eftermarknadsprodukter. Du arbetar enligt gällande ESD- och IPC-standarder.
   

  

**Din profil**
 Vi söker dig med ett genuint intresse för teknik och tillverkning. Dina personliga egenskaper är viktiga då vi ställer stort krav på samarbetsförmåga samt att vara lyhörd inom organisationen. Saab befinner sig i ett läge där verksamheten förändras och utvecklas. Utöver den egna gruppens medlemmar interagerar man ofta med både utvecklingsingenjörer och produktionstekniker vilket gör att intresse, idéer och nytänkande är egenskaper som premieras. Arbetet kräver att du är noggrann som person och har en stor kvalitetsmedvetenhet.
   

  

 För att trivas i rollen och leva upp till förväntningarna ser vi att du:
   

  

* Har utbildning inom elektronik eller inom det tekniska området
* Innehar giltigt lödcertifikat (FSD 5115 eller motsvarande)
* Är utbildad inom IPC (IPC A-610 eller IPC A-620)
* Har erfarenhet inom el och montering
* Är praktiskt lagd och hanterar ritningsläsning


**Meriterande**
* Erfarenhet att arbeta med administrativa planeringssystem (MPS)
* Utbildning i ESD eller kännedom om dess påverkan och risker på elektronik


 Befattningen kräver att du genomgår och godkänns enligt vid var tid gällande bestämmelser för säkerhetsskydd. För befattningar där Saab har krav på säkerhetsklassinplacering kan, i förekommande fall, medföra krav på visst medborgarskap.
   

  

**Ansökningsförfarande**
 Om du känner att detta är intressant för dig är du varmt välkommen att skicka in din ansökan! Vi bearbetar urvalet löpande och du kommer att få återkoppling via mail från oss. Vi strävar efter att återkoppla till dig inom 14 dagar.
   

  

 Notera att denna annons gäller framtida tjänster. Det här är initialt ett konsultuppdrag via Skill, med goda möjligheter till förlängning eller övertagande av anställningen till Saab.
   

  

 Vi tar endast emot ansökningar via vår hemsida skill.se. Vid eventuella frågor angående tjänsten vänligen kontakta ansvarig rekryterare Hedvig Selling på mail hedvig.selling@skill.se
   

  

 Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

 Från rekrytering och bemanning till skräddarsydda utbildningar – på Skill ger vi människor förutsättningar att växa. För när människor växer, växer företag.
   

  

 Skill grundades 1997 och har ett brett tjänsteutbud inom rekrytering, bemanning, hr-tjänster och kompetensutveckling. Med en stark kundbas i teknik- och industriföretag samt inom IT och tech hjälper vi företag till rätt kompetens.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en kvalificerad rekryteringstjänst där vi adderar den kompetens du behöver för att ta din verksamhet vidare mot uppsatta mål. Vi erbjuder dessutom utbildningar som stärker befintliga medarbetare och konsulter.

title: Financial Controller - Stockholm
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 At Tandem Health, we are building a future where health and technology move seamlessly together — and we are growing fast. As we prepare for significant growth, we are now looking for a
 **Financial Controller** 
 to own and scale our accounting processes.
   

  

 You thrive in a hands-on role where you get to improve processes and make them smarter, more efficient and more reliable so that you can keep a broader focus and not being stuck in fundamentals. You use modern tools and invent smart automations and ways of working. You also work well with many different people from various countries as you will be our main contact for the external accounting firms.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who will be the backbone of financial accuracy and enjoy creating the necessary processes to reach there. If you are excited to hands-on take our accounting through a scaling journey - we’d love to meet you!
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead month-end and year-end closing in the Swedish entity and manage monthly group reporting from external accounting firms in other countries.
* Prepare consolidated group financial statements on a monthly basis
* Manage inter-company transactions and eliminations
* Oversee transfer pricing structures and monthly invoicing
* Manage revenue recognition together with the Finance Associate focusing on billing
* Oversee AP and AR processes across entities
* Be up to date with changing accounting regulations that affect the group
* Manage relationships with external accounting firms, auditors and tax advisors
* Financial statements and Annual report for the group and the Swedish parent company, but oversee statutory filings also in other jurisdictions
* Partner with the Head of Finance around reporting, forecasting and process improvements
* Make sure financial compliance and internal controls are built into the ways of working
* Automate and simplify the accounting function as the company scale in volume and complexity


**What You Bring**
* A good mix of calm and excitement that makes you comfortable in a Finance team in a fast-changing start-up/scale-up environment
* Experience from multi-entity or group environment
* You have strong accounting knowledge and is also comfortable with consolidation and inter-company accounting
* You are comfortable in various ERPs and eager to explore next generation accounting tools, somewhat tech-savvy.
* Demonstrable experience in accounting, preferably in a Finance team
* You will need to understand and read Swedish, preferably also speak it, as you will be in contact with Swedish accountants, auditors, authorities etc.


**Bonus**
* Experience from SaaS companies and/or start/scale up
* Experience from international multi-entity set ups
* Prior experience from audit prep


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of
 **Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: Stjärnmäklare/Partner/Franchisetagare till Göteborg Bohuslän
description:
**Nytt år, nya jobbmöjligheter?** 
 🚀
   

  

 Vi söker dig som är fastighetsmäklare och är redo för nästa steg och vill gå över till att mäkla under ett av Sveriges starkaste varumärken. Kanske vill du avancera till stjärnmäklare, partner eller franchisetagare - vad lockar dig? Hos oss blir du en del av en kedja som växer och tar marknadsandelar medan du läser den här annonsen.
   

  

**✨Vi erbjuder:** 
 Du del av vårt framgångsrika team och stöttas av vårt starka varumärke. Vi har ett fulltäckande servicebolag som hjälper dig med allt från juridiska frågor, IT, marknads- eller personalfrågor. Vi erbjuder även kontinuerlig utveckling och utbildning för att ge dig rätt förutsättningar att nå din fulla potential.
   

  

 Vi tror på långsiktigt samarbete och söker därför dig med hög ambitionsnivå, som vill ta LF Fastighetsförmedling till nya höjder tillsammans med oss. Dessutom blir du en del av en fantastiskt rolig arbetsplats med familjär gemenskap.
   

  

**✨Vem är du?** 
 Vi söker dig som har mäklat några år och är redo att axla en större roll. Vi ser gärna att du är en ödmjuk vinnarskalle som har en tydlig vision och kommer att jobba hårt för att nå dina mål. Du bör vara affärsorienterad och företagsam samtidigt som du värdesätter teamkänsla och gemenskap.
   

  

* Det är ett krav att du är registrerad fastighetsmäklare.
* Det är meriterande om du tidigare drivit bolag


**Varför LF Fastighetsförmedling?**
 Vi är idag Sveriges näst största mäklarkedja – något vi är stolta över, men inte nöjda med. Vårt mål är att bli ledande, och vi söker dig som vill vara med på den resan. Här mäklar du under ett av Sveriges starkaste varumärken – med bank, försäkring och fastighetsförmedling under samma tak. Detta ger dig som mäklare fler affärsmöjligheter.
   

  

**Ansökan:** 
 Träffa oss på ett förutsättningslöst samtal eller fika! ☕️All kontakt är givetvis konfidentiell.
   

  

 Per-anders Johanson
   

  

 Kontaktperson
   

  

 Ansök nu
   

  

 0725400061
   

  

 Maila Per-anders Johanson

title: Payroll Specialist
description:
**About The Role**
 We are looking for a Payroll Specialist ready to take full ownership of end-to-end payroll for our Swedish operations. In this role, you will manage payroll for our largest company within Instabee Group with a dynamic blue-collar workforce.
   

  

 Payroll includes employees with diverse schedules, from shift-based work to varying hours, and requires a strong understanding of Swedish collective agreements, preferably within the transport sector (Transportavtalet).
   

  

 This is an opportunity for a self-driven professional to lead the payroll process independently, ensuring accuracy, compliance, and timely delivery while continuously improving processes and maintaining the highest quality standards.
   

  

 You will work closely with your colleagues in the payroll team and internal stakeholders, proactively resolving payroll matters, providing expert guidance, and contributing to a smooth and professional employee experience across the organization.
   

  

**Some Of Your Key Responsibilities**
* Manage end-to-end payroll for the assigned business area, including preparation, validation, execution, and post-payroll activities
* Handle payroll calculations related to shift work and varying schedules
* Ensure compliance with the Swedish transport collective agreement (Transportavtalet)
* Ensure that payroll inputs such as salary changes, bonuses, absences, and deductions are accurately processed
* Perform payroll reconciliations and controls to identify, investigate, and resolve discrepancies
* Ensure compliance with Swedish payroll legislation, tax regulations, and statutory reporting requirements
* Act as the main point of contact for payroll-related queries from employees and internal stakeholders
* Maintain accurate payroll documentation and provide support during audits when required


**About You**
 We are looking for someone with relevant education within payroll and 5+ years of hands-on payroll experience, who feels confident managing the full payroll process independently. You are a senior payroll professional who takes ownership, works proactively, and feels comfortable operating in a role with a high degree of autonomy.
   

  

 You have experience working with complex payroll structures, including blue-collar employees, and are comfortable interpreting and applying collective agreements.
   

  

 As a person, you thrive in a fast-paced environment where you can prioritize effectively and meet deadlines without compromising on accuracy. You are structured, detail-oriented, and efficient, while also being a collaborative team player. You take initiative, are solution-oriented, and feel comfortable stepping outside your comfort zone when needed.
   

  

**Requirements**
* Relevant education within payroll
* 5+ years of experience working with end-to-end payroll
* Experience working with collective agreements, preferably with Transportavtalet
* Experience working with blue-collar employees
* Fluent in Swedish and English


**What We Offer**
 We can promise you that you will be challenged, develop your skills and have the opportunity to work with truly amazing and competent colleagues. If you like changes and want to set new processes and ways of working - this is the place for you!
   

  

**Benefits**
 Of course, we have all the necessary and standard benefits in place, but in addition to this, we can also offer:
   

  

* 🌇 Sky-High Office: Modern and newly renovated with a 360-degree view around Stockholm.
* 🐶 Puppy Friendly: Bring your dog to work - we've got a whole floor for our furry friends!
* 🏓 Fun & Games: Ping pong, Shuffleboard, Foosball, and even a Karaoke Room for your leisure time.
* 👶 Parental Pay for Six Months: Step away from work and provide the best care and love to your little one.
* 🎂 A Day Off on Your Birthday: We love to celebrate, so enjoy your birthday to the fullest with a day off each year!
* ⏰ Hybrid setup and flexible working hours


 Diversity and inclusion is very important to us and we are committed to creating an inclusive work environment. We want to be a workplace where everyone’s perspectives and opinions are valued, and we are dedicated to creating opportunities for all employees to thrive and reach their full potential.
   

  

**Get to know us**
 In 2022, Instabee was founded after combining Budbee and Instabox - two leading last-mile delivery companies with three consumer-facing brands: Budbee, Instabox, and Porterbuddy. Instabee serves millions of consumers across Europe with convenient deliveries and is on track to become the leading European e-commerce enabler. Always with the consumer at heart.
   

  

 We’re fast, both in terms of parcel delivery and when it comes to growing our business. So far our journey has taken us from Sweden to the rest of Scandinavia and parts of continental Europe, but we have no plans on stopping anytime soon. As we continue to expand, the complexity of Instabee grows in parallel. With that in mind, we’re now looking for you to help us on the journey ahead.
   

  

*This recruitment process consists of background checks via Verifiera as a review of previous public criminal records. The result is public information that is handled confidentially. This is mandatory for all recruitment processes at Instabee in Sweden.*

title: Senior Research Engineer - AI Bots
description:
**Description & Requirements**
 Electronic Arts creates next-level entertainment experiences that inspire players and fans around the world. Here, everyone is part of the story. Part of a community that connects across the globe. A place where creativity thrives, new perspectives are invited, and ideas matter. A team where everyone makes play happen.
   

  

 SEED is a pioneering group within Electronic Arts, combining creativity with applied research. We explore, build, and help define the future of interactive entertainment.
   

  

 We exist at EA to deliver and foster inspiring innovation for our games and our players. We do this through exploration, research, prototypes, and never-ending curiosity. We collaborate with game teams and industry partners and also publish our research within our industry and to the public. We pursue long-term applied research yet stay relevant to the present by delivering artifacts along the way to game teams and technology groups inside EA. Some of our research includes bringing digital characters to life, using machine learning for game AI and content creation, and developing novel real-time graphics & physics techniques.
   

  

 We are looking for a Senior Research Engineer to join the Intelligent Agents research vector to create the next generation of game AI. Our work centers on the latest technologies, including Reinforcement Learning, Language Models, and Imitation Learning. The Intelligent Agents team collaborates directly with game studios to create agent solutions today, while also driving toward our long-term goal of developing the next generation of interactive and reasoning agents for players. The team has a track record, having deployed machine learning (ML) agents in FC26 and testing ML agents for the Battlefield franchise. You will focus on foundation models, Language Models (LMs) and Action Models for the purpose of novel AI experiences. This is an applied role. You will translate your ideas into functional demonstrations (e.g. demos) to guide innovation in a very practical way.
   

  

 This is a hybrid remote/in-office role - 3 days/week at the office - from our SEED office in Stockholm, Sweden. You will report to our Intelligent Agents research vector lead.
   

  

**As a Research Engineer At SEED, You Will**
* Develop novel ideas by researching and implementing solutions to some of the most complex challenges in video game AI, helping create difference for EA.
* Contribute to applied research in areas such as Language Models, Reinforcement Learning, and reasoning. This includes proposing new use cases and algorithms for player-facing game AI agents, while targeting real-time, on-device performance.
* Build compelling demos that highlight novel applications of AI agents, NPC behaviors, and game AI bots, with a focus on integration into game engines.
* Share your impact by publishing your work, contributing to open-source, and presenting at conferences.


 As a diverse team with solid goals, we provide autonomy and true influence to each member of SEED. We are looking for an open and curious person; someone who gets a kick out of taking new ideas, investigating them, and adapting their application to games. You have a desire to explore new areas of game development - someone who is passionate, creative, communicative, and invested.
   

  

**Requirements**
* A degree in Computer Science, a STEM field, or equivalent practical experience related to game AI.
* 8+ years of experience in software development, game development, or other relevant roles demonstrating the ability to build real-time game AI experiences.
* Partner with other researchers, engineers, artists, and designers.
* Experience turning ideas into functional prototypes or demos that showcase concepts in practice.
* Excellent programming abilities and ability to explain complex concepts.
* Experience with runtime-compiled languages (e.g., C++, C#) and scripting languages (e.g., Python).
* Working knowledge of game engines such as Unity, Unreal, Godot, or similar technologies.
* A genuine interest in video games paired with a critical understanding of how AI is built in games, including the ability to form your own insights on how you can improve it.


**Additional Qualifications**
* PhD degree in Computer Science or a STEM field.
* Experience with Language Models (LLMs, SLMs), Reinforcement Learning, and Imitation Learning.
* Experience with publications in peer-reviewed conferences or journals.
* Openness to travel for conferences and visit teams across EA studios.


 If you want to be part of — and work with — some of the most incredible people in the field, then this role is for you!
   

  

 To learn more about SEED and our impactful work, check out https://seed.ea.com/
   

  

**About Electronic Arts**
 We’re proud to have an extensive portfolio of games and experiences, locations around the world, and opportunities across EA. We value adaptability, resilience, creativity, and curiosity. From leadership that brings out your potential, to creating space for learning and experimenting, we empower you to do great work and pursue opportunities for growth.
   

  

 We adopt a holistic approach to our benefits programs, emphasizing physical, emotional, financial, career, and community wellness to support a balanced life. Our packages are tailored to meet local needs and may include healthcare coverage, mental well-being support, retirement savings, paid time off, family leaves, complimentary games, and more. We nurture environments where our teams can always bring their best to what they do.
   

  

 Electronic Arts is an equal opportunity employer. All employment decisions are made without regard to race, color, national origin, ancestry, sex, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, age, genetic information, religion, disability, medical condition, pregnancy, marital status, family status, veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. We will also consider employment qualified applicants with criminal records in accordance with applicable law. EA also makes workplace accommodations for qualified individuals with disabilities as required by applicable law.

title: Senior consultants and senior managers to our Finance Strategy & GBS team in Stockholm
description:
Deloitte is a leading global provider of Audit & Assurance, Tax & Legal, and Consultative Services. With more than 457,000 professionals in over 150 countries, we help our clients and society to solve complex problems and achieve ambitious goals. We are driven by one purpose: to make an impact that matters. To us, this means lasting results for our clients and their businesses, ideas and actions that contribute to a greater good. It also means empowering our people and supporting them in their growth journey.
   

  





 Finance Strategy & GBS is part of Deloitte’s global Finance Transformation network with over 11,000 specialists helping finance functions evolve and meet new demands. We work with CFOs and finance leaders to develop strategies, operating models, organisational design, and technical solutions that enable successful transformations.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 As a consultant in the Finance Strategy & GBS team, you will work with clients to drive innovation and transformation within their finance organizations. Your work may involve developing target operating models, implementing systems and processes, set up of Shared Service Center strategies, driving cost optimization, or supporting large-scale transformation initiatives.
   

  

  

  

 You work with digital transformations of the finance function in large companies and organizations. You support the client in handling complex questions, often in connection to technology, and your projects can include the whole journey from defining a strategy to the final implementation.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**
* 3-10 years of relevant work experience
* Experience from working with finance transformation projects such as system implementations, SSC implementations, target operating model, organizational design or post-merger integration
* Experience from management consulting is preferable
* A deep understanding in finance-related processes and a genuine interest for new technologies and how they can be applied and create value for finance
* Experience in managing parts or entire projects, leading the work of others as well as your own.
* Experience from financial services industry is beneficial
* Strong analytical skills and an ambition to find the best solution as well as an ability to communicate and build relationships with different stakeholders
* Strong inner drive and a genuine interest to develop both yourself and others
* Excellent written and verbal ability in English. Swedish is considered a plus


**Additional Information**

**We offer** 
  

  




* Access to a global firm and a powerful network of experienced colleagues
* Great possibilities for you to develop yourself and our business
* Many opportunities for exchange of experiences, training and personal development
* Access to one of the world's largest consultancy organizations, global training programs and specialist networks
* A chance of becoming a key player with a fast growing career, in the national and global consulting arena
* Competitive compensation and benefits



**How to apply** 
  

  

 You apply online. Please submit your CV and short motivation as part of your application.
   

  





 Send your application as soon as possible as we work with continuous selection.
   

  





*As a qualitative part of Deloitte's recruitment process, our final candidates undergo a background check, to increase awareness of our future employees, secure the working environment for our employees and meet regulatory requirements. The background check process is carried out in collaboration with ToFindOut.* 
*https://tofindout.se/en/background-check/*




 For questions, please contact Sara Johansson at sajohansson@deloitte.se
   

  





**We are looking forward to your application!**




**What impact will you make?**




 Every day, your work will make an impact that matters, while you thrive in a dynamic culture of inclusion, collaboration and high performance. We do not just aspire to make solutions. We wish to create an impact that makes a positive and crucial difference for the people around us, our clients and our society. Deloitte is where you’ll find unlimited opportunities to succeed and realize your full potential.

title: Corporate Financial Risk Manager
description:
Step into a pivotal role where your expertise in financial risk will directly shape corporate decision-making and strengthen governance across a leading international group. As Fortum’s Corporate Financial Risk Manager, you will be trusted to drive impactful strategies, collaborate with senior leadership, and influence the financial health of the organisation—offering you a rare opportunity to make your mark, develop professionally, and become a respected advisor within the business.
   

  

**About The Role**
 In this role you will control and actively steer financial risks arising from Fortum’s businesses as well as develop, maintain and embed robust financial risk frameworks covering market, credit, liquidity and financing risks. You will proactively support senior decision-makers and strengthen financial risk, governance, processes and culture across the Group.
   

  

 Key responsibilities might include but not be limited to
   

  

* Take Group and Corporate Risk ownership of financial risk responsibilities across defined portfolios and business areas, linking risk assessments to P&L and balance sheet impact in line with the Risk Appetite Statement.
* Manage development and maintenance of Fortum’s financial risk frameworks, including risk instructions, hedging guidelines, mandates and interfaces with Business Units and Treasury.
* Lead financial risk internal control processes and ensure high-quality, audit-ready evidence, effective remediation of findings and continuous process improvement.
* Provide senior decision support through recurring and ad-hoc analyses (e.g. exposures, stress and scenario analysis, hedge effectiveness, credit and collateral assessments).
* Take ownership of group steering for, and support development of, Group Risk appetite Statement applications in the business, ensuring methodological soundness and transparency.
* Be a recognized financial risk expert and advisor, simplifying complex risk topics into clear recommendations for senior stakeholders.
* Coordinate cross-functional initiatives and sub-streams related to financial risk development, collaborating closely with Business Areas, Treasury, Finance and other Risk teams.


**About You**
 We think that you have extensive experience from financial or commodity risk management, trading, business controlling or a similar role close to financial markets. As foundation, you have a master’s degree in economics, engineering, finance, mathematics or a related field.
   

  

 In order to be successful, you have throughout your career gained extensive knowledge of:
   

  

* the energy business
* commodity or financial markets, derivatives
* hedging strategies
* PnL attribution


 You possess comprehensive understanding of financial risk methodologies as well as their interplay with profit and loss statements and the balance sheet, including: Market risk, Credit risk and Liquidity risk.
   

  

 You have practical experience working with internal regulation relating to governance, policy, mandates, limits, and internal controls.
   

  

 You are recognized for strong logical reasoning abilities in conducting qualitative analyses, producing comprehensive reports, and providing effective support within your business environment. We believe you have strong English proficiency and can clearly present complex analyses to senior executives both verbally and in writing.
   

  

 You recognize with yourself following traits:
   

  

* Initiative-taking, accountable, and structured in development and problem-solving
* Curious, with strong critical and analytical thinking skills
* Able to simplify complex concepts and provide actionable recommendations
* Collaborative, effective in stakeholder management across teams
* Resilient and exercises sound judgment under pressure and ambiguity
* Demonstrated leadership in cross-functional initiatives without formal authority


 This position can either be based in one of our offices in Solna, Sweden or Espoo, Helsinki.
   

  

**Why work with me?**
 I am a leader who is providing you with much freedom to operate and together with colleagues perform and build your competences – caring about your situation and work-life-balance, trusting your competence and abilities, and expecting you to perform whilst owning and organizing your responsibilities.
