My leadership traits are very much aligned with the Fortum values - aiming high by setting challenging longer-term targets, striving to create an interdependent winning team and acting with care based on every individual’s situation.
   

  

 Looking forward to discussing the opportunities and challenges more with you! /Mattias
   

  

**We offer you**
 At Fortum, we believe in a better future and want to be involved in shaping it. Our workplace is a safe place, both physically and mentally. You will grow with professional colleagues, being trusted and free to challenge yourself. We offer comprehensive benefits, flexible working hours, and hybrid work model to support your productivity, development and wellbeing. We are committed to build diverse teams where everyone feels included and is treated equally.
   

  

 More information about our culture and benefits can be found here.
   

  

 Espoo office is a smoke-free workplace.
   

  

 For permanent employment with Fortum Sverige AB, you may be assigned a wartime posting within the organization. For further information regarding wartime posting, please refer to the Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency.
   

  

**Interested?**
 Submit your application at the latest on 7th of April. We start contacting suitable candidates already during the application period. If you have questions and would like to hear more about the position, please Mattias Andersson, Director Financial Risk, mattias.andersson@fortum.com
   

  

 Contact details to union representatives can be found on the bottom of this page.
   

  

 To be selected for the position, the applicant must go through background clearance and a health examination including drug testing.
   

  

**We are Fortum**
 Fortum is a Nordic energy company. We generate and deliver reliable energy to our customers and the Nordic energy system while at the same time helping industries decarbonise their processes and grow. Our core operations comprise efficient and best-in-class low-carbon power generation, customer services, and heating and cooling. Fortum’s power generation is already 99% from renewable or nuclear sources with one of the lowest specific CO2-emissions in Europe. We are guided by our ambitious SBTi-validated emission reduction targets on our way towards net-zero by 2040. For our :4,500 employees, we commit to be a safe and inspiring workplace. Fortum's share is listed on Nasdaq Helsinki. fortum.com

title: Group Accounting Manager - Stockholm
description:
**Build something monumental for Healthcare!**
 At Tandem Health we’re reimagining healthcare by putting clinicians first. Our platform - designed by clinicians, for clinicians - is built on deep insight into real-world pain points, with intuitive medical notes and workflows that truly support patient care.
   

  

 We’re a fast-scaling health-tech company backed by top investors and expanding globally. We move fast, stay curious, and believe building something that matters starts with an extraordinary team. If you're passionate about impact and innovation, we'd love to meet you!
   

  

**About The Role**
 At Tandem Health, we are building a future where health and technology move seamlessly together — and we are growing fast. As we prepare for significant growth, we are now looking for a
 **Group Accounting Manager** 
 to own and scale our accounting processes.
   

  

 You thrive in a hands-on role where you get to improve processes and make them smarter, more efficient and more reliable so that you can keep a broader focus and not being stuck in fundamentals. You use modern tools and invent smart automations and ways of working. You also work well with many different people from various countries as you will be our main contact for the external accounting firms.
   

  

 We are looking for someone who will be the backbone of financial accuracy and enjoy creating the necessary processes to reach there. If you are excited to hands-on take our accounting through a scaling journey - we’d love to meet you!
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead month-end and year-end closing in the Swedish entity and manage monthly group reporting from external accounting firms in other countries.
* Prepare consolidated group financial statements on a monthly basis
* Manage inter-company transactions and eliminations
* Oversee transfer pricing structures and monthly invoicing
* Manage revenue recognition together with the Finance Associate focusing on billing
* Oversee AP and AR processes across entities
* Be up to date with changing accounting regulations that affect the group
* Manage relationships with external accounting firms, auditors and tax advisors
* Financial statements and Annual report for the group and the Swedish parent company, but oversee statutory filings also in other jurisdictions
* Partner with the Head of Finance around reporting, forecasting and process improvements
* Make sure financial compliance and internal controls are built into the ways of working
* Automate and simplify the accounting function as the company scale in volume and complexity


**What You Bring**
* A good mix of calm and excitement that makes you comfortable in a Finance team in a fast-changing start-up/scale-up environment
* Experience from multi-entity or group environment
* You have strong accounting knowledge and is also comfortable with consolidation and inter-company accounting
* You are comfortable in various ERPs and eager to explore next generation accounting tools, somewhat tech-savvy.
* Demonstrable experience in accounting, preferably in a Finance team
* You will need to understand and read Swedish, preferably also speak it, as you will be in contact with Swedish accountants, auditors, authorities etc.


**Bonus**
* Experience from SaaS companies and/or start/scale up
* Experience from international multi-entity set ups
* Prior experience from audit prep


**Location**
 We believe the best ideas happen when we’re together. This role is based in our vibrant HQ in the Epicenter building in the heart of
 **Stockholm** 
 where you will work primarily from our office to collaborate, connect, and build our culture.
   

  

**Culture at Tandem**
 At Tandem, we move fast, think big, and take ownership. We're a high-performing, diverse team with a shared drive to change the future of healthcare - and we’re just getting started.
   

  

 Our culture is built on action, ambition, and learning. You'll be trusted to take the lead, challenge yourself, and make an impact from day one. We believe real growth happens when you're stretched, supported, and surrounded by smart, passionate teammates who want to win together.
   

  

 Even though we’re spread across countries, we come together often in Sweden for team meetings, social events, and offsites - blending global reach with real human connection.
   

  

 We hire for talent, potential, and attitude - valuing different backgrounds and fresh perspectives. Great ideas come from everywhere, and we’re building a team that reflects the world we want to change.
   

  

*Tandem handles sensitive patient data and will conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*

title: SAP Transformation(S/4HANA) Consultant - Sweden
description:
**Role** 
 – Industry Principal/ S/4 Hana Consultant
   

  

**Technology** 
 – SAP Transformation (S/4HANA)
   

  

**Location** 
 – Sweden
   

  

**Compensation** 
 – Competitive (including bonus)
   

  

****Job Description****
 Today, the corporate landscape is dynamic and the world ahead is full of possibilities! None of the amazing things we do at Infosys would be possible without an equally amazing culture, the environment where ideas can flourish and where you are empowered to move forward as far as your ideas will take you.
   

  

 At Infosys, we assure that your career will never stand still, we will inspire you to build what’s next and we will navigate further together. Our journey of learnability, values and trusted relationships with our clients continue to be the cornerstones of our organization and these values are upheld only because of our people.
   

  

**Your role**
 Infosys is seeking a highly experienced and dynamic Industry Principal – SAP (IPCON) to join our expanding European SAP practice. This is a senior leadership role requiring deep SAP expertise, strong business acumen, and a proven track record in steering complex transformation programs.
   

  

 As an Industry Principal, you will shape SAP transformation vision, lead client engagements at the highest levels, architect end to end solutions, and ensure delivery excellence across SAP S/4HANA programs.
   

  

****Key Responsibilities:****
* Lead SAP solutions across multiple end-to-end implementations and transformation programs.
* Drive client engagements from Phase 0 through execution, including Greenfield, Brownfield, and Hybrid S/4HANA projects.
* Collaborate with client stakeholders (Business and IT) to define roadmaps, assess readiness, and build transformation strategies.
* Utilize SAP toolchain for implementation, administration, and optimization.
* Prepare solution proposals, effort estimations, and contribute to RFP responses.
* Mentor and manage project teams, ensuring delivery quality and adherence to timelines.
* Represent Infosys in client meetings with professionalism and strong interpersonal communication.
* Stay current with SAP innovations and contribute to internal knowledge sharing.
* Set and govern the SAP architecture vision across the service line, ensuring alignment with client business strategy, SAP roadmap (e.g., S/4HANA, BTP, RISE), and enterprise standards while balancing innovation, scalability, and cost.
* Lead and mentor the SAP architect community, establishing best practices, reference architectures, and quality gates across delivery, pre sales, and transformation programs to drive consistency and technical excellence.
* Any patent, IP external publication (research papers) will be an added advantage.
* Act as a trusted advisor to CxOs and senior stakeholders, shaping end to end transformation strategies, influencing deal architecture and value propositions, and de risking large, complex SAP programs.


****Skill Required:****
* Deep functional (SAP Finance/Manufacturing/Logistics/Sales) or technical skills (ABAP, Integration, Security, Basis) in one or two SAP ERP skills.
* Experience in SAP S/4HANA, EWM, TM, Business AI, LeanIX, Signavio, Cloud ALM
* Hands-on SAP consulting experience.
* Minimum of 4 full lifecycle SAP project implementations.
* Experience in leading teams in SAP projects.
* Exposure to at least two types of S/4HANA projects: Greenfield, Brownfield, or Hybrid.
* Experience in transformation preparation or Phase 0 activities.
* Proficiency in SAP toolchain usage or administration.
* Valid SAP certification in relevant skill areas.
* Strong client-facing skills with the ability to engage middle management effectively.
* Proven ability to build solution proposals and estimate efforts accurately.
* Demonstrated flexibility, team spirit, and a results-driven mindset.


****Preferred Qualifications:****
* Exposure to multiple SAP modules or skill areas within the SAP product portfolio.
* Publications or thought leadership in SAP or industry-specific domains.


 Role – Industry Principal
   

  

 Technology – SAP S/4HANA, EWM, TM, Business AI, LeanIX, Signavio, Cloud ALM
   

  

 Location – UK, Germany, Netherlands, Finland, Sweden, France
   

  

 Compensation – Competitive (including bonus)
   

  

****Preferred Qualifications:****
* Exposure to multiple SAP modules or skill areas within the SAP product portfolio.
* Publications or thought leadership in SAP or industry-specific domains.


****About Infosys****
 Infosys is a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting. We enable clients in 56 countries to navigate their digital transformation. With over three decades of experience in managing the systems and workings of global enterprises, we expertly steer our clients through the many next of their digital journey. We do it by enabling the enterprise with an AI-powered core that helps prioritize the execution of change. We also empower the business with agile digital at scale to deliver unprecedented levels of performance and customer delight. Our always-on learning agenda drives their continuous improvement through building and transferring digital skills, expertise and ideas from our innovation ecosystem.
   

  

 Visit www.infosys.com to see how Infosys can help your enterprise navigate your next.
   

  

 All aspects of the hiring process and employment at Infosys are based on merit, competence and performance. We are committed to embracing diversity and creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Infosys is proud to be an equal opportunity employer.

title: Audio & Acoustic Engineer (Headphone Development)
description:
**Marshall Group** 
 is the audio, tech, and design powerhouse uniting musicians and music lovers through genre-breaking innovation. Our flagship brand, Marshall, is uniquely positioned with over 60 years of rock ‘n’ roll attitude on stage, at home, and on the go. Our iconic products are brought to life by a dedicated team of 800 passionate employees and sold in over 90 markets worldwide.
   

  

**Right now,** 
 we are looking for an Audio & Acoustic Engineer who will focus on development of headphones.
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
 As an Audio & Acoustic Engineer at Marshall, your main responsibility will be to secure and validate the acoustic design for our headphones. You will join a growing team of passionate engineers with a wealth of experience from different areas of the audio industry. Working as a key member of project teams, along with other engineering and design specialists and our ODM partners, to ensure our products meet the audio requirements. You will work with simulations, prototyping, tuning, measurement, and subjective evaluations to achieve the best possible performance. Goals and development opportunities can be tailored to the successful applicant’s individual strengths and areas of interest.
   

  

**Roles & Responsibilities:**
* Contributing to product development projects as the primary representative of the audio & acoustics team.
* Performing acoustic and audio electronics measurements and subjective evaluation.
* Contributing to product documentation, development test, and production test specifications.
* Collaborating with external partners to take internally developed acoustic concepts into production-ready products.
* DSP development to support the hardware functionality and to achieve the desired product voicing.
* Validating all aspects of the audio design through hands-on measurements and leveraging vendor resources.﻿


**Who we’re looking for:**
 You are comfortable creating and communicating design solutions, with a solid understanding of acoustic measurement procedures, test equipment, requirement handling, and product data management. You are passionate about sound and audio, from the technology behind it to the listening experience. ﻿Above all, your strongest qualities are your curiosity, your willingness to share knowledge, and your drive to solve challenges together with your colleagues.﻿
   

  

**You probably have the following experiences & skills:**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in acoustic engineering or other relevant field.
* Knowledge in product development for consumer electronics.
* Several years of relevant work experience in audio and acoustic engineering and headphone development.
* Experience in requirement management and defining requirements towards external development partners, preferably in China.
* Experience in audio electronics and knowledge of headphone components (e.g., DSP chipsets, transducers, amplifiers, etc.)
* Experience with simulation methods such as lumped-parameter and FEM.
* A big plus if you have practical programming experience using Python, Matlab, and potentially C/C++ for embedded DSP development, and Git for version control.


**Does this sound like you?**
 Please apply with your CV in English.
   

  

 We look forward to seeing your application!
   

  

**Our pledge:**
 We strive to foster an inclusive workplace and we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, disability, colour, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age or marital status. We firmly believe that Marshall thrives when our employees do, leading to better experiences for our consumers.
   

  

 We encourage applications from all over the world. To enable transitioning from another country for a role at Marshall, we offer relocation support. This support is tailored for each role but always includes visa/work permit application, local authority registration, and home-finding service. Don't hesitate to reach out if you have any questions.

title: Capital Raising Operations Professional
description:
**This job is with EQT Group, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly.**
 EQT is seeking a Capital Raising Operations Professional to join our Capital Raising Operations team in Luxembourg. This is a high-impact role focused on managing operational aspects of new fundraises and elevating investor experience. If you enjoy working in a fast-paced, cross-functional environment with global exposure—read on.
   

  

******About The Team******
 The Capital Raising Operations team is part of Fund Operations, a global unit within EQT’s Central Functions. We are looking for an experienced Associate to support new fundraises in Private Wealth Management (PWM) from an operational perspective. The team works closely with several internal and external stakeholders to deliver best-in-class service and provide high-quality support to EQT’s investors.
   

  

 We focus on continuous improvement—streamlining internal processes, enhancing client communication, and leading or supporting various internal projects. We also collaborate with specialist teams across EQT to ensure compliance with investor and regulatory requirements in the alternative fund management industry. This role collaborates closely with teams in Stockholm and across EQT’s global offices.
   

  

******About The Role******
 As a Capital Raising Operations Professional, you will lead and coordinate operational processes tied to new fundraises, with a focus on EQT’s open-ended and semi-liquid fund structures. You’ll be a key point of contact for internal teams and external partners, ensuring smooth investor onboarding, efficient platform integration and a high level of client service. You’ll also help identify and implement process improvements and automation opportunities.
   

  

****Key responsibilities****
* Lead operational sales discussions with clients alongside EQT’s Capital Raising team.
* Coordinate distributor and platform onboarding processes.
* Guide investors through product terms and onboarding documentation.
* Partner with legal and compliance to ensure regulatory alignment.
* Review and support distribution agreements (operational sections).
* Act as the main liaison with transfer agents, managing all trade order types (i.e. Subscriptions/Redemptions etc.) and communications.
* Oversee trading platform setup and monthly trade monitoring.
* Handle investor queries and client service tasks.
* Drive improvements to onboarding processes and digital enablement.
* Contribute to internal projects and operational product developments.


****About you****
 We’re looking for a detail-oriented and proactive professional who thrives in collaborative environments and has a strong service mindset. You’re structured, quality-focused and able to manage competing priorities with confidence.
   

  

****Essential Qualifications And Experience:****
* Bachelor's degree in finance or a related field.
* 5+ years’ relevant experience in private equity, asset management, transfer agency services or a similar role.
* Familiarity with European trading platforms, fund distribution infrastructure, and automated trading processes.
* Strong knowledge of Trade processing (subscriptions/Redemptions)
* Solid understanding of investor onboarding processes within Transfer Agency, including account setup, KYC/AML requirements, and documentation workflows.
* Hands-on experience leading projects, including defining scope, coordinating cross-functional teams, managing timelines, and ensuring successful delivery.


****What we offer****
* A unique opportunity in one of EQT’s fastest-growing areas.
* Work alongside a team of passionate and highly skilled professionals.
* A dynamic, international environment with cross-border collaboration.
* Opportunities for professional development and career growth.
* A chance to shape the operational future of fundraising at EQT.


****Compensation & Benefits Notice****
 We offer a competitive total rewards package including base salary, determined based on the role, experience, skill set, and location. Eligible employees may also receive discretionary incentive compensation, awarded in recognition of individual performance and company results. EQT provides a comprehensive benefits offering designed to support employee wellbeing, development, and work-life balance. Benefits include paid time off, parental leave, wellbeing and wellness support, flexible working arrangements, and learning and development opportunities. Benefits are effective from the first day of employment and may vary by location and role.
   

  

**Salary Range Disclosure**
 Compensation for this Luxembourg-based position is competitive and will be determined based on role scope, experience, skills, and local market conditions. The role is also eligible for an annual discretionary bonus.
   

  

****Inclusion at EQT****
 Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact.
   

  

 Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.
   

  

 At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative, and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.
   

  

******About EQT******
 EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of more than three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR 266 billion in total assets under management (EUR 141 billion in fee-generating assets under management) as of 30 June 2025, within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.
   

  

 With its roots in the Wallenberg family’s entrepreneurial mindset and philosophy of long-term ownership, EQT is guided by a set of strong values and a distinct corporate culture. EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does.
   

  

 The EQT AB Group comprises EQT AB (publ) and its direct and indirect subsidiaries, which include general partners and fund managers of EQT funds as well as entities advising EQT funds. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.
   

  

 More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

**Inclusion at** 
**EQT**
 Our vision for EQT employees is to build high performing & engaged teams. Our competitive edge comes from fostering an environment where every individual feels valued, empowered, and motivated to drive business impact. Our commitment to inclusion is not just about fairness; We understand and believe that being a great place to work drives the best performance.At EQT, inclusion is a business imperative and it's embedded into our talent strategy, decision-making, and culture to ensure that every individual and team operates at their full potential. By doing so, we unlock better collaboration, stronger innovation, and superior investment outcomes.
   

  

****About** 
**EQT****
 EQT is a purpose-driven global investment organization focused on active ownership strategies. With a Nordic heritage and a global mindset, EQT has a track record of over three decades of developing companies across multiple geographies, sectors and strategies. EQT has investment strategies covering all phases of a business’ development, from start-up to maturity. EQT has EUR ‌ 270 billion in total assets under management (EUR ‌ ‌141 billion in fee-generating assets under management), within two business segments – Private Capital and Real Assets.

EQT manages and advises funds and vehicles that invest across the world with the mission to future-proof companies, generate attractive returns and make a positive impact with everything EQT does. EQT has offices in more than 25 countries across Europe, Asia and the Americas and has more than 1,900 employees.
   

  

 More info: www.eqtgroup.com
   

  

 Follow EQT on LinkedIn, X, YouTube and Instagram

title: Sales Enablement Manager – Advanced Staining
description:
**Bring more to life.**
 Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology?
   

  

 At Leica Biosystems, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact.
   

  

 You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life.
   

  

 At Leica Biosystems, we’re not just shaping the future of cancer diagnostics — we’re transforming lives. Our mission of “Advancing Cancer Diagnostics, Improving Lives” is the driving force behind everything we do. As a global leader with the most comprehensive portfolio spanning from biopsy to diagnosis, we empower clinicians with innovative, reliable solutions so they can give patients timely, accurate answers when they need them most. When you join Leica Biosystems, you’re not just taking a job; you’re becoming part of a passionate team that knows every moment matters when it comes to cancer. You’ll help develop diagnostic solutions that turn anxiety into answers, and aid the acceleration of next-generation, life-changing therapies. Surrounded by a diverse and collaborative global community, you’ll be inspired each day to stretch, grow, and make an impact.
   

  

 Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible.
   

  

**The Sales Enablement Manager** 
 – Advanced Staining (Indirect Markets Europe) is a role within the North European Indirect Sales organization. The position reports directly to the Senior Commercial Manager Indirect Markets and is a remote position based either in Sweden or Denmark.
   

  

 This role is responsible for accelerating growth, adoption, and execution quality of the Advanced Staining portfolio across all European indirect markets & CIS countries. The position works closely with Regional Sales Managers and distributor partners to translate strategy into field execution, support complex commercial initiatives, and drive capability building within partner organizations.
   

  

**In This Role, You Will Have The Opportunity To**
* Drive execution of the Advanced Staining strategy across indirect markets in close alignment with Regional Sales Managers and regional priorities.
* Act as a commercial enabler and sparring partner to distributors, supporting prioritization, opportunity development, and execution of strategic deals and projects.
* Lead and support strategic initiatives in selected markets, including portfolio conversions, reagent agreements, reference site development, and complex customer engagements.
* Strengthen distributor commercial capabilities, go-to-market execution, funnel quality, and forecast accuracy for Advanced Staining.
* Support budgeting, multi-year planning, and act as the interface between indirect markets, SU NEE, and BU by providing structured market and competitive feedback.


**The Essential Requirements Of The Job Include**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience.
* Strong commercial and technical experience in medical devices, diagnostics, or life sciences, preferably within indirect sales models, with a deep understanding of Immunohistochemistry, including market dynamics and underlying technology.
* Solid knowledge and experience of Advanced Staining and histopathology.
* Proven commercial acumen, including pricing, margins, forecasting, and tender-driven business.
* Ability to influence and operate effectively in a matrix organization without direct authority.
* Fluency in English is required as well as ability to work independently in a remote, field-based role. Proficiency in Danish or Swedish is valued.
* Proven experience in managing and developing business through indirect sales channels, including distributor and partner networks.


**Travel, & Physical / Environmental Requirements**
* Ability to travel frequently across European & CIS indirect markets, including overnight travel if needed (approximately 50%-60%).
* Valid work permit.


**It would be a plus if you also possess previous experience in:**
* Supporting strategic projects across multiple countries or regions.
* Working closely with commercial leadership in indirect or distributor-led environments.


 At Leica Biosystems, we believe in designing a better, more sustainable workforce. We recognize the benefits of flexible, remote working arrangements for eligible roles. This position is eligible for a remote work arrangement in which you can work remotely from your home. Additional information will be provided during the interview process.
   

  

 We review applications on an ongoing basis and look forward to hearing from you. Submit your application today – we’re excited to learn more about you!
   

  

 Join our winning team today. Together, we’ll accelerate the real-life impact of tomorrow’s science and technology. We partner with customers across the globe to help them solve their most complex challenges, architecting solutions that bring the power of science to life.
   

  

 For more information, visit www.danaher.com.

title: Vice President Engineering, Open Banking
description:
**About Us**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.


Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

**Job Description**


Visa is seeking a seasoned and forward‑thinking engineering leader to head our Open Banking Technology organization. As open banking rapidly expands, Visa is investing heavily across payments, data, risk solutions, and AI‑driven innovation—and this role is central to shaping that future.


In this position, you will lead a 200+ person engineering team distributed across multiple global locations, driving the strategy, delivery, and scale of Visa’s next‑generation Open Banking products. You will play a key role in expanding into new markets, strengthening product quality and security, and accelerating innovation across the portfolio. Partnering closely with product, business, and executive teams, you will help define and deliver the next phase of Visa’s open banking growth journey.


As Vice President of Engineering, you will be a key leader in our organization—chartered to infuse next‑generation thinking into product development practices, anticipate and leverage emerging technologies for strategic advantage, and drive innovation initiatives to deliver a highly differentiated product offering to our clients. You will also champion an AI‑first mindset, ensuring that machine learning, large language models, automation, and intelligent developer tooling are deeply embedded into how we design platforms, build products, and operate at global scale.

**Essential Functions:**

* **Strategic & Technology Leadership for Open Banking**  

Define the long‑term business and technology strategy for the Open Banking vertical, aligning platform vision, product roadmap, and enterprise objectives.
* **End‑to‑End Product & Platform Ownership**  

Lead planning, architecture, and delivery of all Open Banking roadmap commitments, ensuring platforms are highly scalable, secure, and compliant.
* **Large‑Scale Engineering Leadership & Talent Development**  

Oversee a global 200+ engineering organization, recruit top leaders, cultivate an AI‑first, high‑performance culture with strong mentoring, coaching, and technical excellence.
* **Engineering Excellence, Quality, and Operational Integrity**  

Champion rigorous engineering practices, continuous improvement, and best‑in‑class security, reliability, and compliance across all systems.
* **Culture of Accountability, Innovation & Modernization**  

Foster ownership, empowerment, and sustained innovation while driving modernization toward cloud‑native, real‑time, AI‑ready platforms and data foundations.
* **AI Strategy, Client Solutions Innovation & LLM Integration**  

Develop and execute an enterprise AI strategy that enhances client solutions (fraud detection, risk insights, personalization). Deliver high‑value ML/LLM use cases—including support automation and intelligent payment workflows.
* **Developer Productivity & AI‑Enhanced Engineering Practices**  

Accelerate engineering velocity and quality through adoption of AI‑powered developer tools, intelligent CI/CD, and modern engineering best practices.
* **Cloud AI Services & Scalable Platform Architecture**  

Define and govern cloud AI architecture using AWS/GCP/Azure services, vector databases, and real‑time inference systems optimized for scale, cost, and compliance.
* **Executive, Board, and Regulatory Representation**  

Represent technology in board‑level discussions, regulatory reviews, and executive forums, articulating strategy, risk posture, and platform outcomes.

**Qualifications**


•12 or more years of work experience with a Bachelor’s Degree or at least 10 years of experience with an Advanced degree (e.g. Masters/ MBA/JD/MD) or at least 8 years of work experience with a PhD •Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in a STEM field, with advanced coursework or specialization in AI, machine learning, or data driven systems preferred. •15+ years of relevant experience, including 10+ years of technical leadership and 10+ years of people management leading large, distributed global engineering teams. •Proven leadership of 200+ global engineers across multiple time zones and cultures, with experience scaling complex organizations and AI focused teams. •Expertise in designing and engineering highly available, secure, scalable platforms, including systems that support real time AI/ML workloads and data intensive operations. •Hands on experience implementing cloud native architectures, modern design patterns, and cloud based AI/ML services (AWS, GCP, Azure). •Strong command of core engineering best practices, SDLC, and modern DevOps/MLOps practices, including CI/CD, automated testing, model deployment, observability, and drift monitoring. •Experience leading AI, ML, or LLM driven product development, including model lifecycle management, applied machine learning, and integration of large language models into enterprise platforms. •Demonstrated ability to drive adoption of innovative and AI enhanced technologies, including developer productivity tools (AI coding assistants, intelligent quality tools, automated pipelines). •Experience in Agile product development and matrixed organizations, with the ability to drive alignment across engineering, data, AI research, product, and risk stakeholders. •Proven change management skills, especially in modernizing legacy systems, transitioning to cloud native and AI ready architectures, and transforming engineering organizations with an AI first mindset. •Ability to establish a highly collaborative, high performance, innovative culture that encourages ownership, experimentation, responsible AI use, and continuous improvement. •Exceptional analytical reasoning, creativity, and judgment, with the ability to balance strategic thinking and hands on technical depth—especially when navigating complex AI related initiatives. •Track record of recruiting, growing, and retaining high caliber engineering and AI/ML talent, and building strong leadership pipelines. •Excellent communication and executive level influence skills, including the ability to simplify complex AI concepts for business, regulatory, and board audiences. •Success operating in both large global enterprises and high growth environments, with deep knowledge of financial services, payments, and Open Banking strongly preferred. This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.**Visa is an EEO Employer**


Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Sr. SW Engineer
description:
**About Us**  

Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.


At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world.


Join Visa and do work that matters – to you, to your community, and to the world. Progress starts with you.

**Job Description**


Visa’s Technology Organization is a community of problem solvers and innovators reshaping the future of commerce. At Visa Open Banking/Tink, we’re creating the foundations that a new world of finance will be built on. By constantly challenging ourselves to go further and do better, we’re developing the ground-breaking services that businesses will use, to revolutionise the way millions of people manage their money. The world of financial services is changing fast, and we will continue to be at the forefront of it. Through one API, Visa Open Banking/Tink allows customers to access aggregated financial data, initiate payments, enrich transactions and build personal finance management tools. Tink connects to more than 3,400 banks that reach over 250 million bank customers across Europe and other global markets.


The Opportunity:  

If money makes the world go around, we are the ones actually making the money go around! This role is a part of our Payments area and our mission is to allow customers to process payments from any account, at any bank to their own service in a fast and seamless way. Check out reference cases and more information here.


What we offer you:


As one of the first companies in Europe who initiate payments through open banking, working in Payments often means solving complex problems for which there’s no blueprint! You will be working in an international environment where your responsibilities will include:

* Work with technologies which is mainly Java, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Datadog, REST and much more.
* Develop reliable, scalable, high performance and highly distributed open banking payments products for different markets using your technical expertise.
* Innovate around new features and measure how these features perform, being instrumental in bringing the product vision to life.
* Collaborate and build high-quality Payment products by following best engineering practices.


We strongly believe in the power of collaboration, both within our team and in partnership with other teams and stakeholders. Working together is the cornerstone of building exceptional teams, delivering outstanding products, and fostering personal growth. It forms the very essence of our work culture and defines how we operate. Actively contribute to product quality improvements, valuable service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads.


What we’re looking for:


We are currently seeking a talented individual to join the Payments area. We see that you enjoy working with others and that you have a passion for what you do. You want to better the product you are working on as well as your knowledge and skills.


We would like you to have:

* Proven experience working with Java technologies.
* Experience with a fast-paced environment that is product centric.
* Experience from working with DevOps methodologies and tools.
* Experience working with agile methodologies and understand the value of tracking engineering key metrics.
* Collaborate multi-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best-in-class software solutions.
* Actively contribute to product quality improvements, valuable service technology, and new business flows in diverse agile squads.
* Leverage innovative technologies to build the next generation of Payment Services,


The Skills You Bring:

* Energy and Experience: A growth mindset that is curious and passionate about technologies and enjoys challenging projects on a global scale
* Challenge the Status Quo: Comfort in pushing the boundaries, ‘hacking’ beyond traditional solutions
* Language Expertise: Expertise in one or more general development technologies like Java, AWS, Kubernetes, Docker, Datadog, REST and much more.
* Builder: Experience building and deploying modern micro services with quality and scalability.
* Learner: Constant drive to learn new technologies.
* Partnership: Experience collaborating with Product, Developers and Agile/Scrum teams.


\*\*We do not expect that any single candidate would fulfill all of these characteristics. For instance, we have exciting team members who are really focused on building scalable systems but didn’t work with payments technology or web applications before joining Visa.


This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.

**Qualifications**


Bachelors degree OR relevant work experience**Visa is an EEO Employer**


Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

title: Utvecklingschef
description:
*Vill du leda utvecklingen av system som används av miljontals resenärer – varje dag?*

*På Hogia Public Transport Products utvecklar vi verksamhetskritiska system för kollektivtrafik med höga krav på tillgänglighet, kvalitet och långsiktighet. Våra plattformar hanterar realtidsdata, trafikledning och resenärsinformation och når idag 90% av Sveriges resenärer. Nu söker vi en utvecklingschef som vill leda människor, stärka vår leveransförmåga och spela en nyckelroll i vår tekniska och produktmässiga transformation.*

### **Om rollen**


Som Utvecklingschef har du ett operativt helhetsansvar för att utveckla våra team, vår teknikstack och vår leveransförmåga.


Du verkar i en organisation med cirka 25 medarbetare fördelade på tre utvecklingsteam, där utvecklare och testare arbetar tillsammans med stöd av Product Owners, Tech Leads och en Scrum Master.


Ditt uppdrag är att skapa tydlighet, struktur och framdrift i en miljö med hög teknisk komplexitet.

##### **Dina huvudsakliga ansvarsområden**

* Personalansvar för utvecklare och testare i ett eller flera produktteam, inklusive 1-on-1-samtal, löneprocesser, kompetensutveckling och medarbetarskap.
* Driva och stödja förändringsarbete kopplat till AI-adoption, säkerhetsarbete (NIS2/ISO 27001) samt modernisering av teknikstack och arbetssätt.
* Säkerställa att teamen har rätt förutsättningar att leverera med hög kvalitet, tydliga mål, rimlig arbetsbelastning och psykologisk trygghet.
* Samarbeta nära Tech Leads kring tekniska prioriteringar, arkitekturbeslut och teknisk skuld.
* Bidra till rekrytering och onboarding av nya medarbetare.

##### **En central roll i förändring**


Vi står inför en större transformation där du får en viktig roll:

* Produktportföljen ska konsolideras och förenklas
* Äldre lösningar ska moderniseras eller brytas upp
* Teknikstacken ska harmoniseras för ökad effektivitet
* AI som centralt fokus i allt vi gör, både operativt och strategiskt


Du rapporterar till CTO och får god möjlighet att påverka riktningen framåt, samtidigt som du är nära verksamheten och säkerställer leverans här och nu.

### **Vi söker dig som**


Har erfarenhet av att leda utvecklingsteam och förstår vad som krävs för att bygga högpresterande team. Som drivs av att utveckla människor och trivs i gränslandet mellan teknik och ledarskap. Är en erfaren och trygg ledare med en naturlig förmåga att bygga förtroende, och som vill fortsätta utvecklas i en roll med stort ansvar och påverkansmöjlighet.


Vi tror att du har:

* Flera års erfarenhet av personalledning inom mjukvaruutveckling
* God förståelse för modern mjukvaruutveckling, agila arbetssätt och DevOps-principer
* Förmåga att skapa struktur, tydlighet och engagemang
* Intresse för och nyfikenhet kring AI:s påverkan på mjukvaruutveckling och arbetsmetoder
* Erfarenhet av eller intresse för säkerhetsfrågor och compliance i samband med samhällskritisk infrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av att driva förändring och kontinuerligt förbättringsarbete med fokus på modernisering och automatisering


Som person är du:

* Förtroendeingivande och kommunikativ
* Lyhörd och ödmjuk, med förmåga att ta hänsyn till historik
* Resultatorienterad med fokus på leverans
* Bekväm i att balansera operativa och taktiska perspektiv

### **Vi erbjuder**

* Möjlighet att leda och påverka utvecklingen av samhällskritiska system som är centrala i kollektivtrafikens ekosystem
* En nyckelroll i en teknisk transformation med fokus på modernisering och AI-driven utveckling
* Arbeta i Stenungsund med möjlighet till distansarbete två dagar per vecka
* Vara en del av Hogia-koncernen – en stabil och långsiktig arbetsgivare med många utvecklingsmöjligheter

### **Ansökan**


Låter det som en roll för dig? Välkommen med din ansökan.

**Om Hogia-gruppen**


Hogia utvecklar, säljer och supportar programvaror och IT-system för företag som effektivt vill fokusera på sina verksamheter i stället för krånglig och tidsödande administration. Vi erbjuder allt från mindre löne- och bokföringsprogram för småföretagaren till kompletta, branschspecifika IT-lösningar och -system för exempelvis kollektivtrafik, åkerier, godsterminaler, revisionsbyråer och fastighetsbolag. I Hogiagruppen finns 30 operativa bolag, som vart och ett verkar inom ett väl definierat verksamhetsområde. Vår organisationsform bygger uttalat på småskalighet och entreprenörsanda. Företagskulturen skapar engagerade medarbetare. Tillsammans ger vi våra kunder de bästa tänkbara affärslösningarna. Hogia startade sin verksamhet 1980 i Stenungsund. I dag har den privatägda koncernen totalt 650 anställda på kontor i Sverige, Norge och Finland. Mer information om Hogia finns på www.hogia.se.

title: Technical Lead – Microsoft 365 & Identity
description:
Aurobay develops and produces world-class hybrid engines and transmissions. With factories on two continents - Sweden and China - we're a pioneering global supplier of propulsion technology, development services and contract manufacturing. The Aurobay brand brings together over 9,000 dedicated and determined people that design, develop, and manufacture next-generation powertrain solutions for a global market.


Aurobay is part of HORSE Powertrain Limited, a global leader in powertrain solutions. The Group has 19,000 employees, 17 plants and 5 R&D centers across three continents. We partner with OEM customers around the world and offer innovative solutions that can cater to up to 80% of the growing hybrid and combustion powertrain market, enabling a faster transition toward cleaner mobility.


At Aurobay, we are committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and believe that different perspectives and experiences make for a stronger, more innovative company.


We are looking for a skilled and visionary Technical Lead to help shape the future of digital collaboration across our organization. Your mission is to design, evolve, and maintain our Microsoft 365–based collaboration and Identity landscape built on Active Directory and Entra ID — ensuring it is secure, modern, scalable, and delivers a seamless experience for employees.


You’ll work in a true DevOps setup, where the team owns the full lifecycle of the platforms — design, build, deployments, continuous improvement, operations, and support. Together with the team, you will apply modern architectural and technical principles, such as automation-first thinking, event-driven integrations, cloud-native patterns, Infrastructure as Code, and agile ways of working.

**This role combines hands-on engineering with architectural responsibility and cross-team collaboration.**

**What You Will Do**

* Architecture & Technical Leadership
* Own the technical architecture for Microsoft 365 collaboration services, including Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, Viva, Exchange Online, and key integrations.
* Develop and maintain the platform roadmap aligned with business needs, security requirements, and digital workplace strategy.
* Lead design decisions following modern architectural principles such as automation, modularity, resilience, and cloud-native patterns.
* Identify opportunities to modernize, simplify, and automate recurring processes, driving a self-service-first approach.
* Platform Engineering & Operational Excellence
* Engineer, configure, and optimize Microsoft 365, Entra ID, and Active Directory components to ensure secure, reliable, and scalable services.
* Build event-based integrations and automated workflows using PowerShell, Graph API, Azure Functions, Logic Apps, GitHub Actions, IaC, and DevOps practices.
* Support hybrid identity scenarios and ensure a seamless, compliant identity experience.
* Work with operations teams in a DevOps model to resolve complex incidents, remove root causes, and continuously improve platform reliability.

**Collaboration, Advisory & Governance**

* Act as a senior technical advisor to product owners, security teams, architects, and business stakeholders. Support and mentoring team members.
* Support platform governance, lifecycle management, compliance, and adoption initiatives.
* Participate in backlog refinement, strategic discussions, and cross-team planning.
* Communicate complex technical topics in clear and accessible ways.
* Contribute and be a key player in the Tech lead community and in similar communities in the Horse Group context.
* Foster a culture of innovation and continuous

**Skill requirements**

* Deep hands-on experience with Microsoft 365 services (Teams, SharePoint, OneDrive, Purview, Viva, Exchange Online, etc.).
* Strong knowledge of Entra ID, Active Directory, Conditional Access, MFA, hybrid identity, and cloud security fundamentals.
* Experience with event-driven integrations and automation using PowerShell, Graph API, Azure Functions, and Logic Apps.
* Solid understanding of modern engineering practices such as IaC, GitOps, CI/CD pipelines, GitHub Actions, DevOps ways of working, and cloud-native design.
* Proven experience in a technical leadership, architecture, or senior engineering role.

**Nice-to-Have**

* Experience with ServiceNow integrations or workflow automation.
* Knowledge of Purview compliance and data governance capabilities.
* Architectural experience in hybrid cloud environments with Multi-tenant organizations
* Certifications such as MS-700, MS-720, MS-740, SC-300, or equivalent experience.

**Who You Are**

* Curious, solution-oriented, and eager to modernize tools and processes.
* Able to balance engineering depth with business needs and user experience.
* A strong communicator and collaborator who brings clarity and structure.
* Someone who thrives in an agile, iterative, automation-first DevOps environment.

title: Database Specialist
description:
We now have a new requirement and are looking for a consultant colleague with the qualifications listed below. The position is part of our consulting business, which means you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments.

*As part of your application, you may be presented to clients/partners as part of the recruitment process. If selected for the assignment, you will be employed by us and work either with clients or on internal projects and assignments as part of our consulting business.*

 **Your Profile (Must-have requirements)**  

* Good Experience in handling PostgreSQL & MongoDB database in production. (Mandatory skill at least 3 years hands-on managing PROD systems)
* Good Experience handling database in AWS (Amazon web Services) and good cloud engineering knowledge (Mandatory skill)
* Advanced working SQL knowledge and experience working with relational databases, query authoring (SQL) and/or good knowledge of MongoDB.
* Ability to work independently and drive activities.
* Development Experience in Database area will have added advantage.
* Experience in implementing changes to larger database environments
* Knowledge of monitoring tools outside of CloudWatch is an advantage
* Ability to leveraging best practices in continuous integration and delivery is an advantage
* Experience in handling On-Call support


Fluent in English - both written and spoken.  

  

**Application deadline:** 05-04-2026

 **About Us**  

We currently employ experienced consultants in areas such as System Development, AI, Machine Learning, Testing, Cloud, Infra DevOps, and IT Project Management.  

  

Working at Deploja is something entirely different from working at an ordinary consulting company—and we are really proud of that. So, what makes us unique?  

  

We simply offer more than just a high salary and greater freedom; that’s just the beginning. With us, you’ll find the work environment and opportunities you deserve. Welcome to Deploja, where the grass is indeed greener!

 **Vi erbjuder dig följande, Valet är ditt!**


Exciting assignments with our many clients. We focus on long-term projects, which gives you the opportunity to create value for the client while also developing yourself.


A secure monthly salary – together we’ll agree on a base salary depending on your assignments.


Company car – we encourage you to choose an electric car for a more sustainable future.


Occupational pension and great opportunities for salary conversion.


Vacation – Would you like more than 30 days of vacation, perhaps 60 days?


Private health insurance, accident insurance, and life insurance for increased security.


Skills development – you set your own budget and choose the training you wish to attend.


Quality of life – Are you struggling to balance everyday life and wish to work a little less while still earning as much, if not more?

*We handle applications continuously, and due to the high workload, it's especially important to include a short motivation for the position, explaining how you meet the requirements.*

title: Fullstack IoT Engineer
description:
**About Echandia Marine**


Echandia Marine is a leading innovator in sustainable marine battery systems, providing cutting-edge technology to enable cleaner, more efficient marine transport. Our mission is to revolutionize the maritime industry through advanced battery technology, improving efficiency and reducing environmental impact.

**About the Role**


We are looking for a Fullstack IoT Engineer to join our growing software team. In this role, you will design and build scalable, high-performance applications that connect embedded systems, cloud infrastructure, and user interfaces. Your work will directly support the monitoring, diagnostics, and control of our marine battery systems and at the same time support our developing efforts in cloud with both frontend and backend work.

**Key Responsibilities:**

* Design and implement software for battery management system based on maritime standards
* Build robust APIs and backend services to interface with embedded systems and cloud platforms in a Linux environment.
* Develop intuitive and responsive front-end interfaces for internal tools and customer-facing dashboards.
* Collaborate with embedded, test, and systems engineers to ensure seamless integration across the stack.
* Implement secure, scalable, and maintainable software architectures.
* Contribute to DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, and automated testing.
* Participate in code reviews, architecture discussions, and technical mentoring.

**Required Skills:**

* Strong experience in fullstack development using modern frameworks, preferably Angular, Typescript and C#.
* Proficiency in designing RESTful APIs and working with IoT Solutions.
* Experience in developing hardware-near applications
* Solid understanding of software architecture and cyber security.
* Familiarity with data visualization, telemetry, and system monitoring tools.
* Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

**Bonus:**

* Experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, and GCP, and with containerization technologies like Docker and Kubernetes.
* Experience with Agile development methodologies.
* Experience developing embedded applications using C.
* Experience with Linux systems administration.
* Experience with CI/CD and build automation using GitHub Actions.
* Familiarity with databases (SQL and NoSQL) and message brokers such as MQTT and Kafka.
* Knowledge of maritime compliance standards.

title: DevOps Engineer - Stockholm
description:
**Join the planet’s most important fight!**  

  

**Normative is now looking for a DevOps Engineer in Stockholm.**

  

At Normative, we're on a mission to accelerate the transition to a net-zero world. We provide science-based carbon accounting software and tailored advice from net-zero experts, empowering companies to reduce their carbon footprints.


Our Platform team is responsible for cloud infrastructure, platform reliability, security, and quality. We're now looking for a DevOps Engineer to join a small, high-impact team where your work directly enables the technology that helps businesses take action on climate change.

 **About the Role**


As a DevOps Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, implementing, and maintaining our cloud infrastructure, automate CI/CD pipelines, and apply Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles to enhance system uptime, monitoring, and incident response. Your work will ensure the reliability, scalability, and security of our systems while enabling seamless deployment and operations.


You'll be joining a lean team of two engineers meaning you'll have real ownership from day one. The work is hands-on and varied: from AWS and GitHub Actions to deployment pipeline automation. We're looking for someone who has thrived in a start-up or scale-up environment.

 **What You'll Do**

* Architectural Leadership: Drive the AWS Well-Architected Framework as a key advocate, balancing rapid delivery with system stability, security, and cost-efficiency.
* Infrastructure as Code: Design and automate scalable cloud infrastructure on AWS (and GCP) using Terraform or CloudFormation.
* CI/CD & Containers: Build and optimize automated pipelines (GitHub Actions) and manage container orchestration (Docker, ECS/Kubernetes) for seamless microservices delivery.
* Reliability & Observability: Maintain high availability by evolving our monitoring, logging, and alerting stacks (Grafana, etc.) and leading proactive incident management.
* Security & Optimization: Implement infrastructure security best practices and continuously optimize cloud resource performance and spend.
* Cross-Functional Collaboration: Partner with developers and security teams to resolve bottlenecks and improve overall deployment frequency and system health.

 **What You Bring**

* Proven experience as a DevOps Engineer, Site Reliability Engineer (SRE), or Cloud Engineer.
* In-depth experience designing and managing infrastructure on AWS (familiarity with GCP is a strong plus)
* Deep understanding of the AWS Well-Architected Framework to drive security, reliability, and cost-optimization strategies.
* Solid understanding of Site Reliability Engineering principles, including monitoring/alerting, observability (Grafana, Datadog, NewRelic), and incident management (SLIs, SLOs, SLAs).
* Advanced skills in containerization technologies (Docker, AWS ECS, Kubernetes) including container orchestration and microservices management.
* Hands-on experience with CI/CD tools (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, etc.)
* Experience with Terraform or other Infrastructure as Code (IaC) technologies for automating infrastructure management.
* Proficient in Bash for automation; additional experience in Python, JavaScript, or TypeScript is a significant advantage.
* Experience with monitoring, logging, and alerting tools
* Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team and with a wider group of engineers


If you are a driven and passionate individual with a strong desire to make a positive impact on the world, and a real love for DevOps culture, we encourage you to apply. This is an exciting opportunity to join a mission-driven company and make a real difference in the fight against climate change.


Join us and be a part of something bigger than yourself. Together, we can create a more sustainable future for all.  

  

*Not sure you meet 100% of our qualifications? Apply anyway!*

**Location**


Normative operates on a hybrid remote model with offices in Stockholm, Copenhagen, and London. For this role you will be located in our wonderful HQ in Stockholm.  

*At this time we are not able to offer relocation or VISA support for this position.*

**Benefits**

* Market-based salaries and annual merit-based salary reviews
* 30 days/year of paid vacation + up to 2 additional days off
* Pension and parental leave
* 5,000 SEK wellness allowance (**friskvårdsbidrag**) + 1 wellness hour per week
* Social and team-building activities (off-site, after work, winter/summer parties)
* An opportunity to make a real positive impact on the world
* A friendly, supportive and humble working culture

 *We review our benefits packages on a regular basis and might modify our benefits from time to time.*

### **How to Apply**


We adopt a continuous selection process, so please make sure to apply with your CV in English.  

  

Our interview process consists of 4 stages:  

  

1. Screening interview with a member of our Talent Acquisition team  

2. First interview with the hiring manager  

3. Interview with members of the Engineering team  

4. Practical Case Interview


We’re committed to hiring diversely. Having employees from diverse backgrounds brings a wealth of perspectives and experience to our team. We assess candidates based on their experience, skills and unique talents and evaluate everyone against the same criteria.

*Normative handles sensitive financial data and we will therefore conduct a background check before hiring any candidate.*
company_description: Normative's mission is to make known and reduce the sustainability impact of all economic activities on the planet.

title: Reverse Engineer
description:
**Why choose Coody** 
 At Coody, we cut out everything unnecessary to give more back to you as a consultant. And we have done it in the package of a lean and efficient organization, meaning no overpaid managers, no fancy offices and no extravagant conferences. Instead we give you:
   

  

**Maximized Compensation.** 
 Typically a +40% salary increase.
   

  

**Freedom & Flexibility.** 
 No bosses. All digital. Fully remote for those who prefer.
   

  

**Employment Security.** 
 High salary, pension, insurance, paid vacation and a big educational fund.
   

  

**Shape the Future.** 
 Projects and assignments for digital game changers like Spotify, Hemnet, Visa, Tobii, Toca Boca, Mojang, Flightradar24, SJ, and exciting startups and scaleups.
   

  

*As we are growing, we are continuously hiring senior tech consultants and connecting them with impactful projects through our client network.*
**What you'll be doing** 
 As a Senior Reverse Engineer at Coody, you'll take on deep technical assignments that require dissecting, understanding, and working within complex software systems — web, mobile, and beyond. Each assignment is typically 6–24 months, and as a consultant you're expected to ramp up quickly and deliver value from day one.
   

  

 You'll be working in and around security-sensitive environments — analyzing applications, maintaining RE toolchains, and uncovering how systems behave under the hood. You'll own your work end-to-end: from setting up and maintaining reverse engineering environments to writing tooling that helps the teams you work with move faster and smarter.
   

  

**Who you are** 
 We are seeking a
 **Senior Reverse Engineer with at least 5+ years of experience** 
 and a proven ability to get things done. Here's what we're seeking:
   

  

* Hands-on experience with reverse engineering of web and/or mobile applications using interactive disassemblers such as HexRays IDA, Ghidra, or Hopper.
* Practical experience with dynamic instrumentation and injection tools, particularly Frida, for hooking, bypassing security controls, and runtime analysis.
* Strong skills in traffic interception and analysis using tools like Charles Proxy and Wireshark.
* Experience maintaining and troubleshooting iOS or web-based RE environments, including in jailbroken contexts (e.g., using palera1n or similar jailbreak toolchains).
* Ability to build, maintain, and improve internal RE toolkits — you leave things better than you found them.
* Comfortable operating in ambiguous, low-documentation environments where your curiosity drives progress.
* Based in Sweden: You must have Swedish citizenship, a valid work visa, temporary or permanent residency.
* Fluent in English (spoken and written).


**This is Coody** 
 We're one of Sweden's fastest-growing tech consultancies, expanding in both people and revenue. We attribute our growth to our simple yet powerful approach to Gravity-Free Consulting — combining the freedom and flexibility of freelancing with the security of traditional employment.
   

  

 At Coody, we believe in freedom, trust, and ambition, which means you'll feel like a freelancer with free rein on assignments that excite you, while enjoying the benefits of being employed by a company that invests in your growth.
   

  

 Our senior sales team has built a vast, carefully curated client network, enabling our consultants to work with some of the most innovative companies in Sweden, Finland, the US, and the UK across Gaming, Fintech, Medtech, AI, SaaS, Aviation, and Automotive — tackling real technical challenges while shaping their own career paths.
   

  

 We're a
 **diverse community** 
 of ambitious tech professionals, representing more than
 **14 nationalities.**
**Coody is more of a platform than a traditional consultancy.** 
 Everything we do is designed to help you work and live according to your own priorities and ambitions. If you're curious to see how this works in practice, explore our Employee Handbook and discover a company that truly puts consultants first.
   

  

**How to apply** 
 Are you excited to take your career to the next level and meet the criteria? Apply now, and we'll be in touch shortly.

title: DevSecOps Specialist inom Azure
description:
Vi på Iver brinner för innovationer och god laganda, vi är särskilt intresserad av dig som gillar att tänka nytt och dela med dig av dina tankar. Vi söker nu en
 **DevSecOps Specialist med fokus på Azure** 
 som vill bidra till bättre IT-lösningar för våra kunder.
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society**
 Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation. Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort. Med huvudkontor i Stockholm verkar Iver främst i Norden med en agenda att fortsätta expandera. Iver omsätter drygt 3 miljarder SEK och har cirka 1 500 anställda som arbetar på ett av våra 25 kontor i Norden.
   

  

**Din roll på Iver**
 Vi söker en engagerad
 **DevSecOps Specialist inom Azure** 
 till vårt team inom Ivers affärsområde Financial Services & Fintech som vill vara med och skapa säkra och innovativa lösningar för framtiden. Våra kunder inom Financial Services & Fintech är ofta stora nordiska företag eller myndigheter, med krav på hög nivå av informationssäkerhet och infrastruktur som kod. Vissa av dem utgör samhällskritisk verksamhet och/eller har en särskild hotbild.
   

  

 Hos oss får du en viktig roll där du hjälper till att integrera säkerhet i varje steg av vår utvecklings- och driftkedja. Tillsammans med teamet kommer du att bygga en trygg och sömlös leveranspipeline för våra applikationer och system, med fokus på att säkerställa en säker, stabil och smidig process från utveckling till produktion.
   

  

 Som
 **DevSecOps Specialist inom Azure** 
 kommer du att arbeta med att designa, implementera och underhålla säker och skalbar infrastruktur i molnmiljöer, primärt Azure. Automatisering ligger oss varmt om hjärtat, och du kommer att spela en nyckelroll i att effektivt hantera och optimera våra molnresurser. Genom att övervaka infrastrukturen ser du till att vi alltid levererar med hög prestanda och kostnadseffektivitet, samtidigt som säkerheten är prioriterad.
   

  

 En viktig del av ditt arbete kommer att vara att använda verktyg som Terraform, CloudFormation eller Ansible för att säkerställa att vår infrastruktur är repeterbar, lätt att hantera och versionskontrollerad – allt med fokus på säkerhet och effektivitet. Du kommer även att arbeta med containerbaserade applikationer och klusterhantering med Kubernetes och Docker, där säkerhet i containermiljöer står i fokus.
   

  

 Förutom detta kommer du att driva och utveckla våra CI/CD-processer med verktyg som Azure DevOps eller GitLab CI. Här ser du till att varje steg i vår pipeline är tryggt och automatiserat, med säkerhet som en självklar del i hela processen.
   

  

 Vi letar efter dig som brinner för att jobba med modern teknik samt har erfarenhet från flera av ovan nämnda tekniker och vill vara med och skapa lösningar som gör skillnad. Hos oss får du möjligheten att växa tillsammans med ett team specialister som tror på en öppen och varm arbetsmiljö med högt i tak.
   

  

**Vad erbjuder vi dig?**
 På Iver får du möjlighet att arbeta med den senaste tekniken och vara med på en spännande tillväxtresa. Vi är inkluderande och strävar efter ett genuint samarbete mot gemensamma mål. Inom Iver finns stora möjligheter till utveckling och vi finns här för att inspirera dig till att nå dina yrkesmässiga mål. Vi står bakom dig när du vill lära dig mer inom ditt specialområde, ledarskap eller nya områden. Hos Iver är du också en del av ett ambitiöst och innovativt företag, vilket innebär att förbättra, testa, utvärdera och våga ändra hur vi gör saker är viktiga ingredienser för att vi ska utvecklas.
   

  

 Vi på Iver ger samma löfte till våra kollegor som till våra kunder. Löftet är att alltid vara ”beside you”, ”behind you” och ”before you”. Vi kallar det för "
 **The Iver way** 
 ".
   

  

**Förmåner hos oss:**
 📄 Kollektivavtal & trygga villkor
   

  

 🏠 Hybridarbete
   

  

 💪 Friskvårdsbidrag
   

  

 👓 Terminalglasögon
   

  

 ⏳ Tidsbank – 24 h extra ledighet/år
   

  

 🩺 Privat sjukvårdsförsäkring
   

  

 💼 Tjänstepension (ITP) & flexpension
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Iver finns på 25 orter i Norden. För denna roll ser vi att du utgår från ett av våra kontor i Solna.
   

  

**Övrig information:** 
 Vi har kunder inom alla branscher och sektorer inklusive säkerhetsklassad verksamhet, därför genomför vi bakgrundskontroller i samtliga av våra rekryteringsprocesser.
   

  

**Sök till oss!** 
 Urval sker löpande, tjänsten kan tillsättas före sista ansökningsdag. Iver eftersträvar en jämn könsfördelning och värdesätter etnisk och kulturell mångfald. Önskad start är snarast eller enligt överenskommelse.
   

  

**Sista ansökningsdag: 2026-04-30.**
 Välkommen att kontakta kajsa.holzwart@iver.se eller William.kvamme@iver.se vid frågor eller funderingar kring tjänsten.
   

  

 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!
   

  

**We empower our Nordic society** 
 . Iver är en ledande nordisk helhetsleverantör av molnbaserade IT-tjänster med spetskompetens inom drift, cybersäkerhet, cloud och innovation.
   

  

**Våra tjänster är kritiska inte bara för våra kunder – utan för digitaliseringen av samhället i stort.** 
 Vi säkerställer att sjukvården har tillgång till rätt patientdata, att samhällskritiska system aldrig ligger nere och att flygplanen landar säkert. Som en lyhörd och affärsnära helhetspartner möjliggör vi våra kunders innovation – idag och imorgon.

title: Summer worker – Documentation and Process Support
description:
The European Spallation Source (ESS) in Lund, Sweden is a partnership of 13 European countries with the mission to design, construct and operate the world's most powerful neutron source.



Working with us means being part of a challenging and exciting work environment, at a stunning, brand new workplace filled with innovative minds and brilliant people from across the globe.

  


**About the position**  

We are now looking to appoint a summer worker for the IT Infrastructure & Operations group in the IT division.



The IT Infrastructure & Operations group is responsible for managing and maintaining ESS data centres, private cloud infrastructure, servers and computing resources, storage and backup systems, network management, internet connectivity, wireless and mobile networks, identity and access management, and IT security.



As a Documentation and Process Support summer worker, your main tasks will be to assist with the review, clean-up and update of internal documentation across agreed ESS platforms, including the intranet, Confluence, CHESS and JIRA.



You will help update onboarding documentation and related guidance material, review documentation structure, wording, formatting, links, ownership information and metadata, and identify duplicate, outdated, incomplete or inconsistent content for correction.



You will also assist in updating CHESS documentation to reflect organisational and process changes, support the review of JIRA tasks and related records in line with agreed instructions, and maintain clear records of changes made, outstanding issues and recommendations for follow-up by permanent staff.


**About you**  

A suitable background for this position would be:


* Enrolled at university in Information Science, Communications, Business Administration, Information Technology or a related field
* Experience editing or structuring documentation in Confluence, SharePoint, wiki platforms or similar tools would be beneficial
* A strong eye for detail and an interest in documentation quality, process support and content organisation
* Good written and oral communication skills in English
* Minimum age 18 years


We believe that you enjoy creating order, improving clarity and collaborating with a variety of people in an international environment. You are structured, careful and comfortable working through detailed content methodically. We also value initiative, good judgement and the ability to keep track of changes, open questions and follow-up items.


**Duration and location**  

This is a summer work position of 12 weeks. Planned start date is June, 2026 or per agreement.



Your workplace is on-site at ESS in Lund, Sweden.

  


**How to apply**  

Please provide your CV in English . Please note that we only accept applications via the ESS website. The last day to apply is 2026-04-12.



Certain roles at ESS require health and safety and/or security checks, which may be carried out during the recruitment process.


**Contact persons**  

For further information regarding the position, please contact Recruiting Manager Remy Mudingay at remy.mudingay@ess.eu



For trade union information, please contact Unionen representative Nerusha Naicker at nerusha.naicker@ess.eu or SACO/Swedish Association of Graduate Engineers representative Marc Kickulies at marc.kickulies@ess.eu

  


*We look forward to receiving your application!*

title: Summer Worker - Identity and Access Management
description:
The European Spallation Source (ESS) in Lund, Sweden is a partnership of 13 European countries with the mission to design, construct and operate the world's most powerful neutron source.



Working with us means being part of a challenging and exciting work environment, at a stunning, brand new workplace filled with innovative minds and brilliant people from across the globe.

  


**About the position**
